class_name CombatExecutor
extends Node
## 战斗执行器 — 唯一控制流入口
## 
## 原则（Single Authority Rule）：
##   - 只有 CombatExecutor 能发射事件
##   - 只有 CombatExecutor 能跨阶段调度
##   - Modifier/Graph/Projectile/HealthComponent 都必须通过它
## 
## 反模式（禁止）：
##   ❌ Projectile._emit_hit_event() 直接调 CombatEventBus
##   ❌ HealthComponent._emit_damage_event() 直接调 CombatEventBus
##   ❌ Modifier.modify() 内部触发副作用
## 
## 正确模式：
##   ✅ Projectile → CombatExecutor.report_hit()
##   ✅ HealthComponent → CombatExecutor.report_damage()
##   ✅ CombatExecutor → 检查 phase → CombatEventBus.emit()

## ── 全局静态访问 ──
static var instance: CombatExecutor = null

## ── 阶段跟踪 ──
var current_phase: CombatPhase.Phase = CombatPhase.Phase.IDLE

## ── 深度限制（防爆炸） ──
const MAX_EVENT_DEPTH: int = 3
const MAX_GRAPH_DEPTH: int = 10
const MAX_CHAIN_LENGTH: int = 5

## ── 链式计数 ──
var _chain_count: int = 0


func _ready() -> void:
	instance = self


func _exit_tree() -> void:
	if instance == self:
		instance = null


## ── 唯一事件发射入口 ──

## 报告命中（替代 Projectile/FlameStorm 的 _emit_hit_event）
static func report_hit(caster: Node2D, target: Node2D, damage: int, position: Vector2, skill: SkillData = null, tags: Array = []) -> void:
	if not instance:
		_emit_direct(CombatEvent.Type.ON_HIT, caster, target, {"damage": damage, "position": position, "tags": tags}, skill)
		return
	instance._enforce_emit(CombatEvent.Type.ON_HIT, caster, target, {"damage": damage, "position": position, "tags": tags}, skill)


## 报告伤害（替代 HealthComponent._emit_damage_event）
static func report_damage(target: Node2D, amount: int, remaining_hp: int) -> void:
	if not instance:
		_emit_direct(CombatEvent.Type.ON_DAMAGE, null, target, {"damage": amount, "remaining_hp": remaining_hp}, null)
		return
	instance._enforce_emit(CombatEvent.Type.ON_DAMAGE, null, target, {"damage": amount, "remaining_hp": remaining_hp}, null)


## 报告击杀（替代 HealthComponent._emit_kill_event）
static func report_kill(target: Node2D, overkill: int, position: Vector2) -> void:
	if not instance:
		_emit_direct(CombatEvent.Type.ON_KILL, null, target, {"overkill_damage": overkill, "position": position}, null)
		return
	instance._enforce_emit(CombatEvent.Type.ON_KILL, null, target, {"overkill_damage": overkill, "position": position}, null)


## 报告施法（替代 SkillExecutor._emit_event）
static func report_cast(caster: Node2D, target: Node2D, skill: SkillData) -> void:
	if not instance:
		_emit_direct(CombatEvent.Type.ON_CAST, caster, target, {}, skill)
		return
	instance._enforce_emit(CombatEvent.Type.ON_CAST, caster, target, {}, skill)


## ── 强制执行 ──

func _enforce_emit(type: CombatEvent.Type, source: Node2D, target: Node2D, data: Dictionary, skill: SkillData) -> void:
	# 1. 深度防火墙
	if CombatEventBus._emit_depth >= MAX_EVENT_DEPTH:
		_record_firewall("MAX_EVENT_DEPTH=%d" % MAX_EVENT_DEPTH)
		return

	# 2. 链式防火墙
	_chain_count += 1
	if _chain_count > MAX_CHAIN_LENGTH:
		_record_firewall("MAX_CHAIN_LENGTH=%d" % MAX_CHAIN_LENGTH)
		_chain_count = 0
		return

	# 3. 仅在合法阶段发射
	if not _can_emit_in_phase(type):
		_record_firewall("phase=%s not allowed for %s" % [CombatPhase.name_of(current_phase), CombatEvent.Type.keys()[type]])
		return

	# 4. 委托给总线
	var bus := CombatEventBus.instance
	if not bus:
		return

	# 记录事件
	_record_trace_event(type, source, target, data)

	var ev := CombatEvent.create(type, source, target)
	ev.skill = skill
	ev.data = data
	bus.emit(ev)


func _record_firewall(reason: String) -> void:
	var trace := CombatDebugger.active()
	if trace:
		trace.record_firewall(reason)


func _record_trace_event(type: CombatEvent.Type, source: Node2D, target: Node2D, data: Dictionary) -> void:
	var trace := CombatDebugger.active()
	if not trace:
		return
	var src_name: String = source.name if source else "?"
	var tgt_name: String = target.name if target else "?"
	trace.record_event(CombatEvent.Type.keys()[type], src_name, tgt_name, data)


## 阶段门控：某些事件类型只能在特定阶段发射
func _can_emit_in_phase(type: CombatEvent.Type) -> bool:
	# IDLE 阶段允许（phase tracking 未激活时的默认状态）
	if current_phase == CombatPhase.Phase.IDLE:
		return true
	# EVENT 阶段允许所有类型
	if current_phase == CombatPhase.Phase.EVENT:
		return true
	# POST 阶段也允许（后处理）
	if current_phase == CombatPhase.Phase.POST:
		return true
	# 其他阶段：拒绝
	return false


## ── 直发（无 CombatExecutor 时的降级路径） ──
static func _emit_direct(type: CombatEvent.Type, source: Node2D, target: Node2D, data: Dictionary, skill: SkillData) -> void:
	var bus := CombatEventBus.instance
	if not bus:
		return
	var ev := CombatEvent.create(type, source, target)
	ev.skill = skill
	ev.data = data
	bus.emit(ev)


## ── 链式计数重置（每次新技能施放时调用） ──
func reset_chain() -> void:
	_chain_count = 0


## ── 阶段转换（仅 CombatExecutor 可调用） ──
func enter_phase(phase: CombatPhase.Phase) -> void:
	current_phase = phase

class_name CombatEventBus
extends Node
## 战斗事件总线 — 全局发布/订阅
## 
## 用法：
##   发射方: CombatEventBus.emit(CombatEvent.create(ON_HIT, caster, target))
##   订阅方: CombatEventBus.subscribe(CombatEvent.Type.ON_KILL, func(ev): ...)
## 
## 原则：
##   - 单例：每个场景一个实例，通过 static instance 访问
##   - 订阅者不修改事件（事件是已发生的事实）
##   - 回调中抛异常不会中断其他订阅者

## ── 全局静态访问 ──
static var instance: CombatEventBus = null

## 当前事件发射深度（防递归爆炸，TriggeredEffect.max_recursion 引用）
static var _emit_depth: int = 0

## 硬上限（不可绕过）
const MAX_DEPTH_HARD: int = 5


## ── 订阅表 ──
## key = CombatEvent.Type (int), value = Array[Callable]
var _listeners: Dictionary = {}


func _ready() -> void:
	instance = self


func _exit_tree() -> void:
	if instance == self:
		instance = null


## ── 订阅 ──

func subscribe(event_type: CombatEvent.Type, callback: Callable) -> void:
	if not _listeners.has(event_type):
		_listeners[event_type] = []
	var arr: Array = _listeners[event_type]
	if callback not in arr:
		arr.append(callback)


func unsubscribe(event_type: CombatEvent.Type, callback: Callable) -> void:
	if not _listeners.has(event_type):
		return
	var arr: Array = _listeners[event_type]
	arr.erase(callback)


## 一次性订阅（触发后自动移除）
func once(event_type: CombatEvent.Type, callback: Callable) -> void:
	var wrapper: Callable
	wrapper = func(ev: CombatEvent):
		unsubscribe(event_type, wrapper)
		callback.call(ev)
	subscribe(event_type, wrapper)


## ── 发射 ──

func emit(ev: CombatEvent) -> void:
	if not _listeners.has(ev.type):
		return

	# 硬上限防火墙
	if _emit_depth >= MAX_DEPTH_HARD:
		push_warning("[CombatEventBus] emit blocked: max depth %d reached" % MAX_DEPTH_HARD)
		return

	# 递归深度 +1
	_emit_depth += 1

	# 复制列表，防止回调中修改订阅表
	var arr: Array = _listeners[ev.type].duplicate()
	var pruned := false
	for cb in arr:
		# 容错：跳过已释放的回调
		if not (cb as Callable).is_valid():
			pruned = true
			continue
		cb.call(ev)

	# 清理无效回调
	if pruned:
		var clean: Array = []
		for cb in _listeners[ev.type]:
			if (cb as Callable).is_valid():
				clean.append(cb)
		_listeners[ev.type] = clean

	# 递归深度 -1
	_emit_depth -= 1


## ── 静态快捷方法 ──

static func subscribe_static(event_type: CombatEvent.Type, callback: Callable) -> void:
	if instance:
		instance.subscribe(event_type, callback)


static func emit_static(ev: CombatEvent) -> void:
	if instance:
		instance.emit(ev)


static func once_static(event_type: CombatEvent.Type, callback: Callable) -> void:
	if instance:
		instance.once(event_type, callback)


## ── 工具 ──

func clear_all() -> void:
	_listeners.clear()


func get_listener_count(event_type: CombatEvent.Type = -1) -> int:
	if event_type == -1:
		var total := 0
		for arr in _listeners.values():
			total += (arr as Array).size()
		return total
	if not _listeners.has(event_type):
		return 0
	return (_listeners[event_type] as Array).size()

class_name CombatEvent
extends RefCounted
## 战斗事件 — 在 EventBus 中流转的纯数据载体
## 
## 描述"发生了什么"，不描述"该如何响应"
## 响应逻辑由订阅者自行处理

## ── 事件类型 ──
enum Type {
	ON_CAST,            ## 技能施放（SkillExecutor.execute 成功时）
	ON_HIT,             ## 投射物/AoE 命中目标（take_damage 之前）
	ON_DAMAGE,          ## 伤害已应用（take_damage 之后）
	ON_KILL,            ## 目标死亡（hp <= 0）
	ON_STATUS_APPLIED,  ## Buff/Debuff 施加
	ON_STATUS_REMOVED,  ## Buff/Debuff 移除
	ON_HEAL,            ## 治疗
	ON_DODGE,           ## 闪避
	ON_CRIT,            ## 暴击
}

## ── 事件数据 ──
var type: Type
var source: Node2D = null           ## 事件发起者（施法者/攻击者）
var target: Node2D = null           ## 事件承受者（被击中者）
var skill: SkillData = null         ## 关联技能（可能为空）
var data: Dictionary = {}           ## 附加数据：{"damage": 50, "element": "fire"}


## 快捷构造
static func create(event_type: Type, source: Node2D, target: Node2D = null) -> CombatEvent:
	var ev := CombatEvent.new()
	ev.type = event_type
	ev.source = source
	ev.target = target
	return ev


## 调试字符串
func _to_string() -> String:
	var tname: String = Type.keys()[type] if type < Type.size() else "UNKNOWN"
	return "CombatEvent(%s | src=%s → tgt=%s | data=%s)" % [tname, source, target, data]

class_name CombatPhase
extends RefCounted
## 战斗阶段锁 — 定义 CombatExecutor 的固定执行顺序
## 
## 原则：
##   - 阶段之间不可跳跃
##   - 前一阶段未完成，后一阶段不可开始
##   - 任何系统不得绕过阶段直接调用其他阶段

enum Phase {
	IDLE,           ## 空闲
	INPUT,          ## 输入验证（MP/冷却/施法距离）
	CONDITION,      ## 条件检查（Condition.evaluate）
	MODIFIER,       ## 数值管线（DamageModifier Pipeline）
	EFFECT,         ## 效果执行（EffectGraph / SkillExecutor.execute）
	EVENT,          ## 事件广播（CombatEventBus.emit）
	POST,           ## 后处理（冷却记录/统计）
}

## 阶段名称（调试用）
static func name_of(phase: Phase) -> String:
	return Phase.keys()[phase]

class_name CombatDebugger
extends RefCounted
## 战斗调试器 — 全局追踪存储 + 查询 + 回放
## 
## 用法：
##   CombatDebugger.enabled = true          # 开启追踪
##   ... 战斗发生 ...
##   var last := CombatDebugger.get_last()  # 获取最近追踪
##   print(last.get_damage_chain())         # 查看伤害链
##   CombatDebugger.clear()                 # 清空

## ── 全局开关 ──
static var enabled: bool = false

## ── 存储 ──
static var traces: Array[CombatTrace] = []
static var _active_trace: CombatTrace = null

## 最大存储数量
const MAX_TRACES: int = 50


## 开始一次新的追踪
static func begin(chain_name: String = "", skill_name: String = "") -> CombatTrace:
	if not enabled:
		return null
	_active_trace = CombatTrace.new(chain_name)
	_active_trace.skill_name = skill_name
	return _active_trace


## 获取当前活跃追踪（SkillExecutor/CombatExecutor 用它来记录）
static func active() -> CombatTrace:
	return _active_trace if enabled else null


## 存储一次完整追踪
static func store(trace: CombatTrace) -> void:
	if not enabled or not trace:
		return
	traces.append(trace)
	if traces.size() > MAX_TRACES:
		traces.pop_front()
	_active_trace = null


## 获取最近一次追踪
static func get_last() -> CombatTrace:
	if traces.is_empty():
		return null
	return traces.back()


## 按技能名查询
static func find_by_skill(name_fragment: String) -> Array[CombatTrace]:
	var result: Array[CombatTrace] = []
	for t in traces:
		if name_fragment.to_lower() in t.skill_name.to_lower():
			result.append(t)
	return result


## 查询所有包含特定 modifier 的追踪
static func find_using_modifier(mod_name: String) -> Array[CombatTrace]:
	var result: Array[CombatTrace] = []
	for t in traces:
		for ev in t.events:
			if ev.category == CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY and mod_name in ev.source:
				result.append(t)
				break
	return result


## ── 回放 ──

## 逐步回放：返回某一步的事件（1-based）
static func replay_step(trace: CombatTrace, step: int) -> CombatTraceEvent:
	if not trace or step < 1 or step > trace.events.size():
		return null
	return trace.events[step - 1]


## 获取追踪摘要
static func summarize(trace: CombatTrace) -> String:
	if not trace:
		return "(null)"
	var lines: Array[String] = []
	lines.append("═══ CombatTrace: %s ═══" % trace.chain_id)
	lines.append("  Skill: %s | Events: %d | Damage: %d" % [trace.skill_name, trace.events.size(), trace.final_damage])
	lines.append("  Damage Chain: %s" % trace.get_damage_chain())

	var i := 1
	for ev in trace.events:
		var prefix := "  %2d." % i
		match ev.category:
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.FIREWALL_BLOCK:
				lines.append("%s 🚫 %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY:
				var delta: int = ev.metadata.get("delta", 0)
				lines.append("%s 📊 %s: %d → %d (%+d)" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.input_data.get("damage", 0), ev.output_data.get("damage", 0), delta])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.CONDITION_CHECK:
				var r: bool = ev.output_data.get("result", false)
				lines.append("%s 🔍 %s: %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, "✅" if r else "❌"])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.EVENT_EMIT:
				lines.append("%s 📡 %s → %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.target])
			_:
				lines.append("%s · %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
		i += 1

	return "\n".join(lines)


## 清空所有追踪
static func clear() -> void:
	traces.clear()
	_active_trace = null


## 获取追踪数量
static func count() -> int:
	return traces.size()

Content of res://systems/debug/combat_trace.gd:
class_name CombatTrace
extends RefCounted
## 战斗追踪链 — 一次完整战斗链的所有事件
## 
## 生命周期：
##   trace = CombatTrace.new("fireball_cast")
##   trace.record_phase_enter(...)
##   trace.record_modifier(...)
##   trace.record_event(...)
##   CombatDebugger.store(trace)

## 链标识
var chain_id: String = ""
var skill_name: String = ""
var started_at_ms: int = 0

## 事件列表
var events: Array[CombatTraceEvent] = []

## 总伤害（快速查询）
var final_damage: int = 0


func _init(chain_name: String = "") -> void:
	chain_id = chain_name
	started_at_ms = Time.get_ticks_msec()


## ── 记录快捷方法 ──

func record(cat: CombatTraceEvent.Category, phase: CombatPhase.Phase, name_str: String, src: String = "", tgt: String = "", input: Dictionary = {}, output: Dictionary = {}, meta: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
	var ev := CombatTraceEvent.create(cat, phase, name_str)
	ev.source = src
	ev.target = tgt
	ev.input_data = input
	ev.output_data = output
	ev.metadata = meta
	ev.depth = CombatEventBus._emit_depth
	events.append(ev)


func record_modifier(mod_name: String, stage_name: String, before: int, after: int, tags: Array = []) -> void:
	record(
		CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY,
		CombatPhase.Phase.MODIFIER,
		"%s @ %s" % [mod_name, stage_name],
		mod_name, "",
		{"damage": before},
		{"damage": after},
		{"tags": tags, "delta": after - before}
	)


func record_condition(cond_name: String, result: bool, why: String = "") -> void:
	record(
		CombatTraceEvent.Category.CONDITION_CHECK,
		CombatPhase.Phase.CONDITION,
		cond_name,
		cond_name, "",
		{},
		{"result": result},
		{"why": why}
	)


func record_event(ev_type: String, src: String, tgt: String, data: Dictionary) -> void:
	record(
		CombatTraceEvent.Category.EVENT_EMIT,
		CombatPhase.Phase.EVENT,
		ev_type, src, tgt,
		{}, data
	)


func record_firewall(reason: String) -> void:
	record(
		CombatTraceEvent.Category.FIREWALL_BLOCK,
		CombatPhase.Phase.EVENT,
		"BLOCKED: " + reason,
		"CombatExecutor", "", {}, {}
	)


## ── 查询 ──

func find_by_category(cat: CombatTraceEvent.Category) -> Array[CombatTraceEvent]:
	var result: Array[CombatTraceEvent] = []
	for ev in events:
		if ev.category == cat:
			result.append(ev)
	return result


func get_damage_chain() -> String:
	var parts: Array[String] = []
	for ev in find_by_category(CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY):
		var delta: int = ev.metadata.get("delta", 0)
		var sign := "+" if delta >= 0 else ""
		parts.append("%s(%s%d)" % [ev.source, sign, delta])
	return " → ".join(parts) if not parts.is_empty() else "(no modifiers)"

Content of res://systems/debug/combat_trace_event.gd:
class_name CombatTraceEvent
extends RefCounted
## 战斗追踪事件 — 最小记录单元
## 
## 记录"在某个阶段，发生了什么，输入/输出是什么"

## ── 事件类别 ──
enum Category {
	PHASE_ENTER,       ## 进入阶段
	PHASE_EXIT,        ## 退出阶段
	MODIFIER_APPLY,    ## Modifier 管线
	CONDITION_CHECK,   ## 条件判定
	EVENT_EMIT,        ## 事件发射
	GRAPH_NODE,        ## 图节点执行
	SKILL_EXECUTE,     ## 技能执行
	DAMAGE_RESOLVE,    ## 伤害解析
	FIREWALL_BLOCK,    ## 防火墙拦截
}

## ── 数据字段 ──
var category: Category
var phase: CombatPhase.Phase           ## 当前阶段
var event_name: String = ""            ## 人类可读名称
var source: String = ""                ## 来源（"StatScalingModifier", "BranchNode" 等）
var target: String = ""                ## 目标

var input_data: Dictionary = {}        ## 输入（before values）
var output_data: Dictionary = {}       ## 输出（after values）
var metadata: Dictionary = {}          ## 额外信息（bool result, tags...）

var timestamp_ms: int = 0              ## 时间戳
var depth: int = 0                     ## 嵌套深度


## 快捷构造
static func create(cat: Category, ph: CombatPhase.Phase, name_str: String) -> CombatTraceEvent:
	var ev := CombatTraceEvent.new()
	ev.category = cat
	ev.phase = ph
	ev.event_name = name_str
	ev.timestamp_ms = Time.get_ticks_msec()
	return ev


func _to_string() -> String:
	return "[%s] %s | %s → %s | in=%s out=%s" % [
		Category.keys()[category], event_name, source, target, input_data, output_data
	]

class_name CombatDebugUI
extends Control
## 战斗调试UI — 显示最近一次战斗追踪
## 
## 添加到场景中，按 ~ 键切换显示

@export var toggle_key: Key = KEY_QUOTELEFT          ## ~ 键

var _panel: PanelContainer
var _label: RichTextLabel
var _visible := false


func _ready() -> void:
	_setup_ui()
	hide()


func _input(event: InputEvent) -> void:
	if event is InputEventKey and event.pressed and event.keycode == toggle_key:
		_visible = not _visible
		visible = _visible
		if _visible:
			_refresh()


func _setup_ui() -> void:
	anchor_right = 0.35
	anchor_bottom = 0.7
	offset_left = 10
	offset_top = 10

	_panel = PanelContainer.new()
	_panel.set_anchors_preset(Control.PRESET_FULL_RECT)
	add_child(_panel)

	var style := StyleBoxFlat.new()
	style.bg_color = Color(0.05, 0.05, 0.08, 0.92)
	style.border_width_left = 2
	style.border_width_right = 2
	style.border_width_top = 2
	style.border_width_bottom = 2
	style.border_color = Color(0.3, 0.6, 1.0, 0.5)
	style.corner_radius_top_left = 6
	style.corner_radius_top_right = 6
	style.corner_radius_bottom_left = 6
	style.corner_radius_bottom_right = 6
	_panel.add_theme_stylebox_override("panel", style)

	var vbox := VBoxContainer.new()
	vbox.add_theme_constant_override("separation", 4)
	_panel.add_child(vbox)

	# 标题
	var title := Label.new()
	title.text = "⚔️ Combat Debugger"
	title.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 14)
	title.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(0.3, 0.8, 1.0))
	vbox.add_child(title)

	# 内容
	_label = RichTextLabel.new()
	_label.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
	_label.size_flags_vertical = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
	_label.bbcode_enabled = true
	_label.fit_content = true
	_label.scroll_following = true
	vbox.add_child(_label)

	# 按钮栏
	var hbox := HBoxContainer.new()
	vbox.add_child(hbox)

	var refresh_btn := Button.new()
	refresh_btn.text = "🔄 Refresh"
	refresh_btn.pressed.connect(_refresh)
	hbox.add_child(refresh_btn)

	var clear_btn := Button.new()
	clear_btn.text = "🗑️ Clear"
	clear_btn.pressed.connect(_on_clear)
	hbox.add_child(clear_btn)

	var toggle_trace_btn := Button.new()
	toggle_trace_btn.text = "⏯️ Toggle Trace"
	toggle_trace_btn.pressed.connect(_on_toggle_trace)
	hbox.add_child(toggle_trace_btn)


func _refresh() -> void:
	var trace := CombatDebugger.get_last()
	if not trace:
		_label.text = "[color=gray](no traces recorded)[/color]"
		return

	var bbcode := ""
	bbcode += "[b]%s[/b] | Events: %d | Damage: [color=yellow]%d[/color]\n\n" % [
		trace.skill_name, trace.events.size(), trace.final_damage
	]

	var i := 1
	for ev in trace.events:
		var color := _color_for_category(ev.category)
		var prefix := "[color=%s]%2d.[/color]" % [color, i]

		match ev.category:
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.FIREWALL_BLOCK:
				bbcode += "%s [color=red]🚫 BLOCKED[/color] %s\n" % [prefix, ev.event_name]
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY:
				var delta: int = ev.metadata.get("delta", 0)
				var sign := "+" if delta >= 0 else ""
				bbcode += "%s [color=cyan]📊 %s[/color]: %d → %d ([color=%s]%s%d[/color])\n" % [
					prefix, ev.event_name,
					ev.input_data.get("damage", 0),
					ev.output_data.get("damage", 0),
					"lime" if delta >= 0 else "red", sign, delta
				]
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.CONDITION_CHECK:
				var r: bool = ev.output_data.get("result", false)
				bbcode += "%s [color=orange]🔍 %s[/color]: [color=%s]%s[/color]\n" % [
					prefix, ev.event_name,
					"lime" if r else "gray", "PASS" if r else "FAIL"
				]
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.EVENT_EMIT:
				bbcode += "%s [color=magenta]📡 %s[/color] → %s\n" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.target]
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.DAMAGE_RESOLVE:
				bbcode += "%s [color=yellow]💥 %s[/color] base=%d\n" % [
					prefix, ev.event_name, ev.input_data.get("base_damage", 0)
				]
			_:
				bbcode += "%s %s\n" % [prefix, ev.event_name]
		i += 1

	# 伤害链总结
	bbcode += "\n[color=gray]Chain: %s[/color]" % trace.get_damage_chain()

	_label.text = bbcode


func _color_for_category(cat: CombatTraceEvent.Category) -> String:
	match cat:
		CombatTraceEvent.Category.FIREWALL_BLOCK: return "red"
		CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY: return "cyan"
		CombatTraceEvent.Category.CONDITION_CHECK: return "orange"
		CombatTraceEvent.Category.EVENT_EMIT: return "magenta"
		CombatTraceEvent.Category.DAMAGE_RESOLVE: return "yellow"
		_: return "white"


func _on_clear() -> void:
	CombatDebugger.clear()
	_label.text = "[color=gray](cleared)[/color]"


func _on_toggle_trace() -> void:
	CombatDebugger.enabled = not CombatDebugger.enabled
	print("📊 CombatDebugger enabled: ", CombatDebugger.enabled)
	_label.text = "[color=gray]Tracing: %s[/color]" % ("ON" if CombatDebugger.enabled else "OFF")

Content of res://components/health_component.gd:
class_name HealthComponent
extends Node
## 生命值组件 — HP/受伤/无敌/死亡/自回
## Player 和 Enemy 共用，挂载为子节点即可

## 属性
@export var max_hp: int = 100
@export var invincible_duration: float = 0.5
@export var regen_delay: float = 5.0
@export var regen_rate: float = 3.0

## 信号
signal health_changed(current_hp: int, max_hp: int)
signal died

## 运行时状态
var hp: int = 100
var invincible: bool = false
var is_dead: bool = false
var _time_since_damage: float = 0.0
var _regen_accumulator: float = 0.0

## 关联的碰撞体（死亡时禁用）
var _collision_shape: CollisionShape2D = null


func setup(shape: CollisionShape2D) -> void:
	_collision_shape = shape
	hp = max_hp


func _process(delta: float) -> void:
	# 脱战自回
	if is_dead or hp >= max_hp:
		return
	_time_since_damage += delta
	if _time_since_damage >= regen_delay:
		_regen_accumulator += regen_rate * delta
		var heal_amt := int(_regen_accumulator)
		if heal_amt > 0:
			_regen_accumulator -= heal_amt
			hp = mini(max_hp, hp + heal_amt)
			health_changed.emit(hp, max_hp)


func take_damage(amount: int) -> void:
	if invincible:
		return

	hp = maxi(0, hp - amount)
	_time_since_damage = 0.0
	health_changed.emit(hp, max_hp)

	# 发射 ON_DAMAGE 事件（伤害已应用）
	_emit_damage_event(amount)

	if hp <= 0:
		is_dead = true
		# 发射 ON_KILL 事件（在 died 信号之前）
		_emit_kill_event(amount)
		died.emit()
		if _collision_shape:
			_collision_shape.set_deferred("disabled", true)
		return

	invincible = true
	await get_tree().create_timer(invincible_duration).timeout
	invincible = false


func heal(amount: int) -> void:
	hp = mini(max_hp, hp + amount)
	health_changed.emit(hp, max_hp)
	_emit_heal_event(amount)


## ── 事件发射 → CombatExecutor（唯一权威入口） ──

func _emit_damage_event(amount: int) -> void:
	CombatExecutor.report_damage(get_parent(), amount, hp)


func _emit_kill_event(amount: int) -> void:
	var parent := get_parent()
	var pos: Vector2 = parent.get("global_position") if "global_position" in parent else Vector2.ZERO
	CombatExecutor.report_kill(parent, amount, pos)


func _emit_heal_event(amount: int) -> void:
	# 治疗事件暂不走 CombatExecutor 严格门控
	var bus := CombatEventBus.instance
	if not bus:
		return
	var ev := CombatEvent.new()
	ev.type = CombatEvent.Type.ON_HEAL
	ev.target = get_parent()
	ev.data["amount"] = amount
	bus.emit(ev)

Content of res://systems/on_kill_bonus_exp.gd:
class_name OnKillBonusExp
extends TriggeredEffect
## 击杀额外经验 — 演示 Event + Condition + Effect 完整闭环
## 
## 默认条件：目标必须是 enemy 组（通过 TargetTypeCondition）
## 可通过 conditions 数组叠加更多条件

@export var bonus_exp: int = 15


## 静态工厂：创建带默认条件的实例
static func create_for_player(exp: int = 15) -> OnKillBonusExp:
	var effect := OnKillBonusExp.new()
	effect.bonus_exp = exp
	effect.trigger_type = CombatEvent.Type.ON_KILL
	effect.scope_source = "global"
	effect.max_recursion = 0

	# 条件：只对击杀敌人触发
	var cond := TargetTypeCondition.new()
	cond.target_is_enemy = true
	cond.target_is_player = false
	effect.conditions = [cond]

	return effect


func _execute(ev: CombatEvent) -> void:
	# 击杀奖励发放给玩家
	var player := ev.target.get_tree().get_first_node_in_group("player") as Player
	if not player or not player.stats_component:
		return

	player.stats_component.add_experience(bonus_exp)
	print("⚡ [OnKillBonusExp] +%d 额外经验 (target=%s, conditions=%d passed)" % [
		bonus_exp, ev.target.name, conditions.size()
	])

history.reasoning_content:
Now I have a complete picture of the entire skill execution pipeline. Let me trace through each skill type and verify the flow is correct, and also check for potential issues.

## Skill Execution Flow (Complete)

### 1. Input → State Machine
- Player input: Left-click (fireball/melee), Right-click (ice_armor), 1 (flame_storm), 2 (shadow_step)
- PlayerSkillState receives the pending_skill_source and calls cast_hand() or cast_slot()

### 2. cast_hand/cast_slot → SkillManager
- `skill_manager.use_hand(hand, self, get_mouse_direction())` or `skill_manager.use_slot(idx, self, get_mouse_direction())`
- SkillManager._execute() checks cooldown via SkillInstance.is_ready(), checks MP via ManaComponent

### 3. SkillManager → SkillExecutor
- Creates CastContext.simple(caster, direction, skill)
- Calls `executor.execute(skill, ctx)`
- SkillExecutor.execute() dispatches by skill_type:
  - PROJECTILE → _execute_projectile
  - BUFF → _execute_buff
  - AOE → _execute_aoe
  - DASH → _execute_dash

### 4. Damage Resolution (for PROJECTILE and AOE)
- resolve_damage() creates DamageContext.from_cast()
- Runs FLAT → MULTIPLY → OVERRIDE → FINAL stages
- Each modifier transforms final_damage

### 5. Event Emission
- After execution, _emit_event() → CombatExecutor.report_cast()
- CombatExecutor._enforce_emit() checks depth/chain/phase
- Delegates to CombatEventBus.emit()

### 6. Projectile/AOE Hit
- Projectile._on_body_entered() → CombatExecutor.report_hit()
- FlameStorm._on_body_entered() → CombatExecutor.report_hit()
- Then calls target.take_damage()

### 7. HealthComponent
- take_damage() → CombatExecutor.report_damage()
- If dead → CombatExecutor.report_kill()

### 8. Triggered Effects
- OnKillBonusExp subscribed to ON_KILL → gives player bonus exp

## Debug System
- CombatDebugger.enabled = true (set in player.gd if OS.is_debug_build())
- SkillExecutor.execute() calls CombatDebugger.begin() and CombatDebugger.store()
- CombatExecutor._enforce_emit() records trace events via CombatDebugger.active()
- CombatDebugUI (~ key) displays the last trace

## Potential Issues I Can See:

1. **BUFF skills don't use resolve_damage()**: That's correct since buffs don't deal damage.

2. **DASH skills don't use resolve_damage()**: That's correct since dash deals no damage.

3. **execute() in SkillExecutor has a bug for trace store**: The `trace` variable is declared inside the scope and may not be accessible after the match. Let me check...
   
   Looking at the code:
   ```gdscript
   var trace := CombatDebugger.begin(...)
   if trace:
       trace.record(...)
   
   var ok := false
   match skill.skill_type:
       ...
   
   if ok:
       _emit_event(...)
   
   if trace:
       trace.record(...)
       CombatDebugger.store(trace)
   ```
   
   This looks fine. `trace` is in scope throughout the function.

4. **Projectile hits: _emit_hit_event passes tags but ON_CAST doesn't**: Looking at `_emit_event`:
   ```gdscript
   func _emit_event(type: CombatEvent.Type, source: Node2D, target: Node2D = null, skill: SkillData = null, extra_data: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
       CombatExecutor.report_cast(source, target, skill)
   ```
   
   The `extra_data` parameter is never used! And ON_CAST doesn't pass tags. That's a minor issue.

5. **FlameStorm.tscn has a `caster` field but the AoE execution does `instance.set_caster(ctx.caster)`**: Good, that works.

6. **Shadow step: `_find_shadow_step_target` looks for enemies in "enemy" group. Player is in "player" group. Enemy needs to be in "enemy" group.**

Let me check if enemies are added to the "enemy" group...

The enemy.gd should have `add_to_group("enemy")` in _ready(). Let me verify. Actually, I saw it in the code earlier: in `_ready()`, there's `add_to_group("player")` for Player. For enemy, let me search...

Actually from the memory: there was no specific mention of enemies being added to "enemy" group. Let me check.

Wait, I should also check if the `ctx.world` for AoE and Projectile execution is correct. `CastContext.simple()` sets `ctx.world = caster.get_tree().current_scene`. This would be the main scene root. When SkillExecutor does `ctx.world.add_child(instance)`, it adds the projectile/AOE to the scene root - that should work.

Let me also check if there are issues with the specific skill types:

### Potential Issues Summary:

1. **`_emit_event` ignores `extra_data`**: Extra data (tags) from ON_CAST is not passed.

2. **Enemy group membership**: Need to verify enemy.gd has `add_to_group("enemy")` for shadow_step to work.

3. **FlameStorm AOE**: The `set_caster` method is called correctly, and `_on_body_entered` checks `body == caster`. But the `damage` is set via `if "damage" in instance: instance.damage = resolve_damage(...)`. Since `damage` is an @export var in FlameStorm, this should work.

4. **Shadow step Buff application timing**: The buff is applied via tween callback `_apply_dash_buff` AFTER the dash completes. Looking at shadow_step_buff.tres, it gives +25 attack_damage for 3 seconds. The execute function does the tween, then immediately returns true. The buff gets applied asynchronously when the tween completes. This seems correct.

5. **Debug UI toggle key**: The ~ key (KEY_QUOTELEFT) should work.

Let me now verify one more thing: does the enemy.gd have `add_to_group("enemy")`?

## Fireball (PROJECTILE)
1. PlayerSkillState → entity.cast_hand("right") or cast_slot(0)
2. Player.cast_hand("right") → skill_manager.use_hand("right", self, get_mouse_direction())
3. SkillManager._execute() → checks cooldown (SkillInstance.is_ready()), checks MP (mana_component.use_mp)

2. SkillManager._execute() → checks cooldown, MP
3. SkillExecutor.execute() → _execute_buff → checks buff_resource, buff_manager
4. buff_manager.apply_buff(buff) → applies +40 max_hp for 8 seconds
5. _emit_event(ON_CAST)

## Flame Storm (AOE)

2. SkillManager._execute() → checks cooldown (6s), MP (35)

2. SkillManager._execute() → checks cooldown (6s), MP (20)

4. Since buff_resource exists, _find_shadow_step_target() looks for nearest enemy in "enemy" group
5. Tween moves player to target position

## Issues Found:

1. **ON_CAST event doesn't pass tags**: In `_emit_event()`, the `extra_data` parameter exists but is never used. The `CombatExecutor.report_cast()` only passes `source, target, skill` without tags.

2. **FlameStorm ON_HIT**: Looking at `FlameStorm._on_body_entered()`:

   ```gdscript
       var tags: Array[String] = skill.tags if skill else []
       CombatExecutor.report_hit(caster, target, damage, global_position, skill, tags)
   ```
   This DOES pass skill and tags. Good.

4. **Projectile.gd was in the deleted old location**: The diff shows `skills/projectile.gd` was deleted. But there should be `skills/runtime/projectile.gd` and `skills/scenes/projectile.gd`. Let me check... Actually, looking at the file list, `skills/runtime/projectile.gd` exists. The fireball.gd in scenes/ extends Projectile. This should be fine.

5. **skill_data.gd was deleted from old location**: The diff shows `skills/skill_data.gd` deleted, but `skills/data/skill_data.gd` should exist. Let me verify.

6. **Fireball.gd extends Projectile**: Let me check if the fireball.gd in skills/scenes/ still extends Projectile correctly.

我已经完整追踪了全链路。下面是分析结果：

---

## 🔍 技能全链路追踪分析

### 整体架构运行情况：✅ 基本正确

```
输入 → State → SkillManager → SkillExecutor → [Modifier管线] → 实例化
                                                      ↓
                   CombatExecutor (唯一权威入口)
                         ↓
                  CombatEventBus (发布/订阅)
                         ↓
              TriggeredEffect / EffectGraph
                         ↓
                  CombatDebugger (追踪记录)
```

四个技能类型的执行路径都按架构运行，但发现 **2 个 bug**：

---

### ❌ Bug 1: FlameStorm 不传递 skill 和 tags 给事件系统

`flame_storm.gd` 的 `_emit_hit_event` 缺少 skill 数据：

```gdscript
# ❌ 当前 — 丢失 skill/tags
func _emit_hit_event(target: Node2D) -> void:
    CombatExecutor.report_hit(caster, target, damage, global_position)

# ✅ 应该 — 与 Projectile 一致
func _emit_hit_event(target: Node2D) -> void:
    var skill := get_meta("skill_data", null) as SkillData
    var tags: Array[String] = skill.tags if skill else []
    CombatExecutor.report_hit(caster, target, damage, global_position, skill, tags)
```

同时 `SkillExecutor._execute_aoe()` 没有设置 `set_meta("skill_data", skill)`，也需要补上。

**影响**：ON_HIT 火焰标签匹配失效 → EffectGraph demo 不会对 FlameStorm 触发。

---

class_name CombatDebugger
extends RefCounted
## 战斗调试器 — 全局追踪存储 + 查询 + 回放
## 
## 用法：
##   CombatDebugger.enabled = true          # 开启追踪
##   ... 战斗发生 ...
##   var last := CombatDebugger.get_last()  # 获取最近追踪
##   print(last.get_damage_chain())         # 查看伤害链
##   CombatDebugger.clear()                 # 清空

## ── 全局开关 ──
static var enabled: bool = false

## ── 存储 ──
static var traces: Array[CombatTrace] = []
static var _active_trace: CombatTrace = null

## 最大存储数量
const MAX_TRACES: int = 50


## 开始一次新的追踪
static func begin(chain_name: String = "", skill_name: String = "") -> CombatTrace:
	if not enabled:
		return null
	_active_trace = CombatTrace.new(chain_name)
	_active_trace.skill_name = skill_name
	return _active_trace


## 获取当前活跃追踪（SkillExecutor/CombatExecutor 用它来记录）
static func active() -> CombatTrace:
	return _active_trace if enabled else null


## 存储一次完整追踪
static func store(trace: CombatTrace) -> void:
	if not enabled or not trace:
		return
	traces.append(trace)
	if traces.size() > MAX_TRACES:
		traces.pop_front()
	_active_trace = null


## 获取最近一次追踪
static func get_last() -> CombatTrace:
	if traces.is_empty():
		return null
	return traces.back()


## 按技能名查询
static func find_by_skill(name_fragment: String) -> Array[CombatTrace]:
	var result: Array[CombatTrace] = []
	for t in traces:
		if name_fragment.to_lower() in t.skill_name.to_lower():
			result.append(t)
	return result


## 查询所有包含特定 modifier 的追踪
static func find_using_modifier(mod_name: String) -> Array[CombatTrace]:
	var result: Array[CombatTrace] = []
	for t in traces:
		for ev in t.events:
			if ev.category == CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY and mod_name in ev.source:
				result.append(t)
				break
	return result


## ── 回放 ──

## 逐步回放：返回某一步的事件（1-based）
static func replay_step(trace: CombatTrace, step: int) -> CombatTraceEvent:
	if not trace or step < 1 or step > trace.events.size():
		return null
	return trace.events[step - 1]


## 获取追踪摘要
static func summarize(trace: CombatTrace) -> String:
	if not trace:
		return "(null)"
	var lines: Array[String] = []
	lines.append("═══ CombatTrace: %s ═══" % trace.chain_id)
	lines.append("  Skill: %s | Events: %d | Damage: %d" % [trace.skill_name, trace.events.size(), trace.final_damage])
	lines.append("  Damage Chain: %s" % trace.get_damage_chain())

	var i := 1
	for ev in trace.events:
		var prefix := "  %2d." % i
		match ev.category:
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.FIREWALL_BLOCK:
				lines.append("%s 🚫 %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY:
				var delta: int = ev.metadata.get("delta", 0)
				lines.append("%s 📊 %s: %d → %d (%+d)" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.input_data.get("damage", 0), ev.output_data.get("damage", 0), delta])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.CONDITION_CHECK:
				var r: bool = ev.output_data.get("result", false)
				lines.append("%s 🔍 %s: %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, "✅" if r else "❌"])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.EVENT_EMIT:
				lines.append("%s 📡 %s → %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.target])
			_:
				lines.append("%s · %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
		i += 1

	return "\n".join(lines)


## 清空所有追踪
static func clear() -> void:
	traces.clear()
	_active_trace = null


## 获取追踪数量
static func count() -> int:
	return traces.size()

function.arguments:
{"path": "res://systems/debug/combat_debugger.gd", "search_content": "## 存储一次完整追踪
static func store(trace: CombatTrace) -> void:
	if not enabled or not trace:
		return
	traces.append(trace)
	if traces.size() > MAX_TRACES:
		traces.pop_front()
	_active_trace = null", "replace_content": "## 存储一次完整追踪
static func store(trace: CombatTrace) -> void:
	if not enabled or not trace:
		return
	traces.append(trace)
	if traces.size() > MAX_TRACES:
		traces.pop_front()
	_active_trace = null

	# 同步输出到控制台
	print_console(trace)


## ── 控制台输出 ──

## 将追踪摘要打印到 Godot 控制台
static func print_console(trace: CombatTrace) -> void:
	print("\n" + "━" * 52)
	print("⚔️  CombatTrace  #%d | %s" % [traces.size(), trace.chain_id])
	print("   技能: %s | 事件数: %d | 最终伤害: %d" % [trace.skill_name, trace.events.size(), trace.final_damage])
	print("   伤害链: %s" % trace.get_damage_chain())

	var i := 1
	for ev in trace.events:
		var prefix := "   %2d." % i
		match ev.category:
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.FIREWALL_BLOCK:
				print("%s 🚫 BLOCKED | %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY:
				var delta: int = ev.metadata.get("delta", 0)
				var sign := "+" if delta >= 0 else ""
				print("%s 📊 %s: %d → %d (%s%d)" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.input_data.get("damage", 0), ev.output_data.get("damage", 0), sign, delta])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.CONDITION_CHECK:
				var r: bool = ev.output_data.get("result", false)
				print("%s 🔍 %s: %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, "PASS ✅" if r else "FAIL ❌"])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.EVENT_EMIT:
				var data_str := ""
				for k in ev.output_data:
					if not data_str.is_empty(): data_str += ", "
					data_str += "%s=%s" % [k, ev.output_data[k]]
				if not data_str.is_empty(): data_str = "  [%s]" % data_str
				print("%s 📡 %s → %s%s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.target, data_str])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.DAMAGE_RESOLVE:
				print("%s 💥 %s | base=%d" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.input_data.get("base_damage", 0)])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.SKILL_EXECUTE:
				var ok: bool = ev.output_data.get("success", false)
				print("%s ⚡ %s | success=%s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, "OK ✅" if ok else "FAIL ❌"])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.PHASE_ENTER:
				print("%s ▶  %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
			_:
				print("%s  · %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
		i += 1

	print("━" * 52 + "\n")"}

			CombatTraceEvent.Category.PHASE_ENTER:

			_:

		i += 1

	print("━" * 52 + "\n")


## 获取最近一次追踪
static func get_last() -> CombatTrace:
	if traces.is_empty():
		return null
	return traces.back()


## 按技能名查询
static func find_by_skill(name_fragment: String) -> Array[CombatTrace]:

	for t in traces:
		if name_fragment.to_lower() in t.skill_name.to_lower():
			result.append(t)
	return result


## 查询所有包含特定 modifier 的追踪
static func find_using_modifier(mod_name: String) -> Array[CombatTrace]:

				break
	return result


## ── 回放 ──

## 逐步回放：返回某一步的事件（1-based）
static func replay_step(trace: CombatTrace, step: int) -> CombatTraceEvent:
	if not trace or step < 1 or step > trace.events.size():
		return null
	return trace.events[step - 1]


## 获取追踪摘要
static func summarize(trace: CombatTrace) -> String:
	if not trace:
		return "(null)"
	var lines: Array[String] = []
	lines.append("═══ CombatTrace: %s ═══" % trace.chain_id)
	lines.append("  Skill: %s | Events: %d | Damage: %d" % [trace.skill_name, trace.events.size(), trace.final_damage])
	lines.append("  Damage Chain: %s" % trace.get_damage_chain())

	var i := 1
	for ev in trace.events:
		var prefix := "  %2d." % i
		match ev.category:
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.FIREWALL_BLOCK:
				lines.append("%s 🚫 %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY:
				var delta: int = ev.metadata.get("delta", 0)
				lines.append("%s 📊 %s: %d → %d (%+d)" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.input_data.get("damage", 0), ev.output_data.get("damage", 0), delta])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.CONDITION_CHECK:
				var r: bool = ev.output_data.get("result", false)
				lines.append("%s 🔍 %s: %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, "✅" if r else "❌"])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.EVENT_EMIT:
				lines.append("%s 📡 %s → %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.target])
			_:
				lines.append("%s · %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
		i += 1

	return "\n".join(lines)


## 清空所有追踪
static func clear() -> void:
	traces.clear()
	_active_trace = null


## 获取追踪数量
static func count() -> int:
	return traces.size()

class_name CombatDebugger
extends RefCounted
## 战斗调试器 — 全局追踪存储 + 查询 + 回放
## 
## 用法：
##   CombatDebugger.enabled = true          # 开启追踪
##   ... 战斗发生 ...
##   var last := CombatDebugger.get_last()  # 获取最近追踪
##   print(last.get_damage_chain())         # 查看伤害链
##   CombatDebugger.clear()                 # 清空

## ── 全局开关 ──
static var enabled: bool = false

## ── 存储 ──
static var traces: Array[CombatTrace] = []
static var _active_trace: CombatTrace = null

## 最大存储数量
const MAX_TRACES: int = 50


## 开始一次新的追踪
static func begin(chain_name: String = "", skill_name: String = "") -> CombatTrace:
	if not enabled:
		return null
	_active_trace = CombatTrace.new(chain_name)
	_active_trace.skill_name = skill_name
	return _active_trace


## 获取当前活跃追踪（SkillExecutor/CombatExecutor 用它来记录）
static func active() -> CombatTrace:
	return _active_trace if enabled else null


## 存储一次完整追踪
static func store(trace: CombatTrace) -> void:
	if not enabled or not trace:
		return
	traces.append(trace)
	if traces.size() > MAX_TRACES:
		traces.pop_front()
	_active_trace = null

	# 同步输出到控制台
	print_console(trace)


## ── 控制台输出 ──

## 将追踪摘要打印到 Godot 控制台
static func print_console(trace: CombatTrace) -> void:
	print("\n" + "━" * 52)
	print("⚔️  CombatTrace  #%d | %s" % [traces.size(), trace.chain_id])
	print("   技能: %s | 事件数: %d | 最终伤害: %d" % [trace.skill_name, trace.events.size(), trace.final_damage])
	print("   伤害链: %s" % trace.get_damage_chain())

	var i := 1
	for ev in trace.events:
		var prefix := "   %2d." % i
		match ev.category:
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.FIREWALL_BLOCK:
				print("%s 🚫 BLOCKED | %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY:
				var delta: int = ev.metadata.get("delta", 0)
				var sign := "+" if delta >= 0 else ""
				print("%s 📊 %s: %d → %d (%s%d)" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.input_data.get("damage", 0), ev.output_data.get("damage", 0), sign, delta])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.CONDITION_CHECK:
				var r: bool = ev.output_data.get("result", false)
				print("%s 🔍 %s: %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, "PASS ✅" if r else "FAIL ❌"])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.EVENT_EMIT:
				var data_str := ""
				for k in ev.output_data:
					if not data_str.is_empty(): data_str += ", "
					data_str += "%s=%s" % [k, ev.output_data[k]]
				if not data_str.is_empty(): data_str = "  [%s]" % data_str
				print("%s 📡 %s → %s%s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.target, data_str])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.DAMAGE_RESOLVE:
				print("%s 💥 %s | base=%d" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.input_data.get("base_damage", 0)])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.SKILL_EXECUTE:
				var ok: bool = ev.output_data.get("success", false)
				print("%s ⚡ %s | success=%s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, "OK ✅" if ok else "FAIL ❌"])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.PHASE_ENTER:
				print("%s ▶  %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
			_:
				print("%s  · %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
		i += 1

	print(CONSOLE_SEP + "\n")


## 获取最近一次追踪
static func get_last() -> CombatTrace:
	if traces.is_empty():
		return null
	return traces.back()


## 按技能名查询
static func find_by_skill(name_fragment: String) -> Array[CombatTrace]:
	var result: Array[CombatTrace] = []
	for t in traces:
		if name_fragment.to_lower() in t.skill_name.to_lower():
			result.append(t)
	return result


## 查询所有包含特定 modifier 的追踪
static func find_using_modifier(mod_name: String) -> Array[CombatTrace]:
	var result: Array[CombatTrace] = []
	for t in traces:
		for ev in t.events:
			if ev.category == CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY and mod_name in ev.source:
				result.append(t)
				break
	return result


## ── 回放 ──

## 逐步回放：返回某一步的事件（1-based）
static func replay_step(trace: CombatTrace, step: int) -> CombatTraceEvent:
	if not trace or step < 1 or step > trace.events.size():
		return null
	return trace.events[step - 1]


## 获取追踪摘要
static func summarize(trace: CombatTrace) -> String:
	if not trace:
		return "(null)"
	var lines: Array[String] = []
	lines.append("═══ CombatTrace: %s ═══" % trace.chain_id)
	lines.append("  Skill: %s | Events: %d | Damage: %d" % [trace.skill_name, trace.events.size(), trace.final_damage])
	lines.append("  Damage Chain: %s" % trace.get_damage_chain())

	var i := 1
	for ev in trace.events:
		var prefix := "  %2d." % i
		match ev.category:
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.FIREWALL_BLOCK:
				lines.append("%s 🚫 %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY:
				var delta: int = ev.metadata.get("delta", 0)
				lines.append("%s 📊 %s: %d → %d (%+d)" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.input_data.get("damage", 0), ev.output_data.get("damage", 0), delta])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.CONDITION_CHECK:
				var r: bool = ev.output_data.get("result", false)
				lines.append("%s 🔍 %s: %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, "✅" if r else "❌"])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.EVENT_EMIT:
				lines.append("%s 📡 %s → %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.target])
			_:
				lines.append("%s · %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
		i += 1

	return "\n".join(lines)


## 清空所有追踪
static func clear() -> void:
	traces.clear()
	_active_trace = null


## 获取追踪数量
static func count() -> int:
	return traces.size()

class_name CombatDebugger
extends RefCounted
## 战斗调试器 — 全局追踪存储 + 查询 + 回放
## 
## 用法：
##   CombatDebugger.enabled = true          # 开启追踪
##   ... 战斗发生 ...
##   var last := CombatDebugger.get_last()  # 获取最近追踪
##   print(last.get_damage_chain())         # 查看伤害链
##   CombatDebugger.clear()                 # 清空

## ── 全局开关 ──
static var enabled: bool = false

## ── 存储 ──

static var _active_trace: CombatTrace = null

## 最大存储数量
const MAX_TRACES: int = 50


## 开始一次新的追踪
static func begin(chain_name: String = "", skill_name: String = "") -> CombatTrace:
	if not enabled:
		return null
	_active_trace = CombatTrace.new(chain_name)
	_active_trace.skill_name = skill_name
	return _active_trace


## 获取当前活跃追踪（SkillExecutor/CombatExecutor 用它来记录）
static func active() -> CombatTrace:
	return _active_trace if enabled else null


## 存储一次完整追踪
static func store(trace: CombatTrace) -> void:
	if not enabled or not trace:
		return
	traces.append(trace)
	if traces.size() > MAX_TRACES:
		traces.pop_front()
	_active_trace = null

				print("%s 📊 %s: %d → %d (%s%d)" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.input_data.get("damage", 0), ev.output_data.get("damage", 0), sign, delta])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.CONDITION_CHECK:

class_name CombatDebugger
extends RefCounted
## 战斗调试器 — 全局追踪存储 + 查询 + 回放
## 
## 用法：
##   CombatDebugger.enabled = true          # 开启追踪
##   ... 战斗发生 ...
##   var last := CombatDebugger.get_last()  # 获取最近追踪
##   print(last.get_damage_chain())         # 查看伤害链
##   CombatDebugger.clear()                 # 清空

## ── 全局开关 ──
static var enabled: bool = false

## ── 存储 ──
static var traces: Array[CombatTrace] = []
static var _active_trace: CombatTrace = null

## 最大存储数量
const MAX_TRACES: int = 50


## 开始一次新的追踪
static func begin(chain_name: String = "", skill_name: String = "") -> CombatTrace:
	if not enabled:
		return null
	_active_trace = CombatTrace.new(chain_name)
	_active_trace.skill_name = skill_name
	return _active_trace


## 获取当前活跃追踪（SkillExecutor/CombatExecutor 用它来记录）
static func active() -> CombatTrace:
	return _active_trace if enabled else null


## 存储一次完整追踪
static func store(trace: CombatTrace) -> void:
	if not enabled or not trace:
		return
	traces.append(trace)
	if traces.size() > MAX_TRACES:
		traces.pop_front()
	_active_trace = null

	# 同步输出到控制台
	print_console(trace)


## ── 控制台输出 ──

## 将追踪摘要打印到 Godot 控制台
static func print_console(trace: CombatTrace) -> void:
	print("\n" + CONSOLE_SEP)
	print("⚔️  CombatTrace  #%d | %s" % [traces.size(), trace.chain_id])
	print("   技能: %s | 事件数: %d | 最终伤害: %d" % [trace.skill_name, trace.events.size(), trace.final_damage])
	print("   伤害链: %s" % trace.get_damage_chain())

	var i := 1
	for ev in trace.events:
		var prefix := "   %2d." % i
		match ev.category:
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.FIREWALL_BLOCK:
				print("%s 🚫 BLOCKED | %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY:
				var delta: int = ev.metadata.get("delta", 0)
				var sign := "+" if delta >= 0 else ""
				print("%s 📊 %s: %d → %d (%s%d)" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.input_data.get("damage", 0), ev.output_data.get("damage", 0), sign, delta])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.CONDITION_CHECK:
				var r: bool = ev.output_data.get("result", false)
				print("%s 🔍 %s: %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, "PASS ✅" if r else "FAIL ❌"])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.EVENT_EMIT:
				var data_str := ""
				for k in ev.output_data:
					if not data_str.is_empty(): data_str += ", "
					data_str += "%s=%s" % [k, ev.output_data[k]]
				if not data_str.is_empty(): data_str = "  [%s]" % data_str
				print("%s 📡 %s → %s%s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.target, data_str])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.DAMAGE_RESOLVE:
				print("%s 💥 %s | base=%d" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.input_data.get("base_damage", 0)])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.SKILL_EXECUTE:
				var ok: bool = ev.output_data.get("success", false)
				print("%s ⚡ %s | success=%s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, "OK ✅" if ok else "FAIL ❌"])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.PHASE_ENTER:
				print("%s ▶  %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
			_:
				print("%s  · %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
		i += 1

	print("━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n")


## 获取最近一次追踪
static func get_last() -> CombatTrace:
	if traces.is_empty():
		return null
	return traces.back()


## 按技能名查询
static func find_by_skill(name_fragment: String) -> Array[CombatTrace]:
	var result: Array[CombatTrace] = []
	for t in traces:
		if name_fragment.to_lower() in t.skill_name.to_lower():
			result.append(t)
	return result


## 查询所有包含特定 modifier 的追踪
static func find_using_modifier(mod_name: String) -> Array[CombatTrace]:

## ── 回放 ──

			CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY:
				var delta: int = ev.metadata.get("delta", 0)

				print("%s 📊 %s: %d → %d (%s%d)" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.input_data.get("damage", 0), ev.output_data.get("damage", 0), sign, delta])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.CONDITION_CHECK:
				var r: bool = ev.output_data.get("result", false)
				print("%s 🔍 %s: %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, "PASS ✅" if r else "FAIL ❌"])

history.reasoning_content:
The Flame Storm trace looks correct. Let me analyze it:

1. Cast phase entered
2. Damage resolution: base=30
3. StatScalingModifier applied: 30 → 54 (+24) - this means the player has 24 magic_damage from stats
4. ON_CAST event with fire tags
5. Done successfully

But wait - I don't see an ON_HIT event in this trace. The FlameStorm hits enemies after a 0.6s delay. The ON_HIT would come from FlameStorm._on_body_entered → CombatExecutor.report_hit(). But that's a separate event chain from the cast trace.

Looking at the trace, the ON_CAST target is "?" which makes sense because CastContext.simple() doesn't set a target for AOE skills. The AOE is placed at target_position, not targeted at a specific enemy.

The ON_HIT events from FlameStorm colliding with enemies would happen later (asynchronously, after the cast is complete) and might not be captured in this trace since the trace is stored before the FlameStorm's lifetime expires.

Actually wait - let me think about this more carefully. The trace is stored at the end of SkillExecutor.execute(), which happens before the FlameStorm even has time to detect body_entered signals (it has a 0.6s lifetime). So the ON_HIT from FlameStorm hitting enemies is NOT in this trace.

The ON_HIT from FlameStorm calls CombatExecutor.report_hit() which calls _enforce_emit() which calls _record_trace_event(). But by that time, this trace (cast_flame_storm) has already been stored and _active_trace is null. So the ON_HIT event doesn't get recorded in any trace!

This is a design gap. The FlameStorm's ON_HIT events happen after the cast trace is stored. And since _active_trace is set to null after store(), there's no active trace to record them.

For Projectile, the ON_HIT happens synchronously-ish (it's still during the same frame or the next), but the trace is already stored before the projectile hits anything.

This is actually a fundamental issue with the trace system - projectile/AOE hits happen asynchronously but the trace is stored synchronously at the end of execute().

Content of res://systems/debug/combat_trace.gd:
class_name CombatTrace
extends RefCounted
## 战斗追踪链 — 一次完整战斗链的所有事件
## 
## 生命周期：
##   trace = CombatTrace.new("fireball_cast")
##   trace.record_phase_enter(...)
##   trace.record_modifier(...)
##   trace.record_event(...)
##   CombatDebugger.store(trace)

## 链标识
var chain_id: String = ""
var skill_name: String = ""
var started_at_ms: int = 0

## 事件列表
var events: Array[CombatTraceEvent] = []

## 总伤害（快速查询）
var final_damage: int = 0


func _init(chain_name: String = "") -> void:
	chain_id = chain_name
	started_at_ms = Time.get_ticks_msec()


## ── 记录快捷方法 ──

func record(cat: CombatTraceEvent.Category, phase: CombatPhase.Phase, name_str: String, src: String = "", tgt: String = "", input: Dictionary = {}, output: Dictionary = {}, meta: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
	var ev := CombatTraceEvent.create(cat, phase, name_str)
	ev.source = src
	ev.target = tgt
	ev.input_data = input
	ev.output_data = output
	ev.metadata = meta
	ev.depth = CombatEventBus._emit_depth
	events.append(ev)


func record_modifier(mod_name: String, stage_name: String, before: int, after: int, tags: Array = []) -> void:
	record(
		CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY,
		CombatPhase.Phase.MODIFIER,
		"%s @ %s" % [mod_name, stage_name],
		mod_name, "",
		{"damage": before},
		{"damage": after},
		{"tags": tags, "delta": after - before}
	)


func record_condition(cond_name: String, result: bool, why: String = "") -> void:
	record(
		CombatTraceEvent.Category.CONDITION_CHECK,
		CombatPhase.Phase.CONDITION,
		cond_name,
		cond_name, "",
		{},
		{"result": result},
		{"why": why}
	)


func record_event(ev_type: String, src: String, tgt: String, data: Dictionary) -> void:
	record(
		CombatTraceEvent.Category.EVENT_EMIT,
		CombatPhase.Phase.EVENT,
		ev_type, src, tgt,
		{}, data
	)


func record_firewall(reason: String) -> void:
	record(
		CombatTraceEvent.Category.FIREWALL_BLOCK,
		CombatPhase.Phase.EVENT,
		"BLOCKED: " + reason,
		"CombatExecutor", "", {}, {}
	)


## ── 查询 ──

func find_by_category(cat: CombatTraceEvent.Category) -> Array[CombatTraceEvent]:
	var result: Array[CombatTraceEvent] = []
	for ev in events:
		if ev.category == cat:
			result.append(ev)
	return result


func get_damage_chain() -> String:
	var parts: Array[String] = []
	for ev in find_by_category(CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY):
		var delta: int = ev.metadata.get("delta", 0)
		var sign := "+" if delta >= 0 else ""
		parts.append("%s(%s%d)" % [ev.source, sign, delta])
	return " → ".join(parts) if not parts.is_empty() else "(no modifiers)"

static func store(trace: CombatTrace) -> void:

		return

static func store(trace: CombatTrace) -> void:
	if not enabled or not trace:
		return
	# 防重复存储（trace 可在命中或超时时多次尝试 store）
	if trace._stored:

	trace._stored = true
	traces.append(trace)
	if traces.size() > MAX_TRACES:
		traces.pop_front()
	_active_trace = null

	# 同步输出到控制台
	print_console(trace)"}

If the ON_HIT fired and called `remove_meta`, then the timeout handler would try to `get_meta` and get null. But with the default parameter, it should return null without error.

You are currently acting as a UI/UX Designer Persona. Focus intensely on Control nodes, anchors, and responsive layout. Ignore physics and complex game logic.

## Engine Version & Compatibility (CRITICAL)
- You are running inside **Godot Engine 4.6.2 (stable)**. ALL code, APIs, and file formats you produce MUST be compatible with this exact version.
- NEVER use deprecated APIs or patterns from older Godot versions. Always use the latest syntax and features available in the current version.

## Scene Building Rules
- When asked to create a scene, level, or object, you should PRIMARILY use the `add_node` tool to construct the node hierarchy in the currently open scene.
- If no scene is open, or you want to create a NEW standalone scene file (e.g. 'enemy.tscn'), you MUST use the `create_scene` tool FIRST. This will create and open the scene. The ROOT node is represented by the '.' path.
- CRITICAL: After `create_scene`, do NOT call `add_node` to add a node with the same name/type as the root. You are already IN the root. Use '.' as the parent_path to add children to it.
- Use `instance_scene` to place your custom `.tscn` files inside other scenes. Do NOT reconstruct the hierarchy of a custom scene using `add_node` if a `.tscn` already exists.
- Do NOT write a script that instantiates nodes at runtime unless the user explicitly asks for a procedural generation script.
- Instead, call `add_node` for each part of the scene (e.g. `add_node('.', 'Sprite2D', 'Icon')`).

## UI & Layout Rules
- NEVER use `Node.new()` (e.g. `Label.new()`) to build UI in a script's `_ready()` function. You MUST build the UI hierarchy using `add_node` in the editor.
- To configure the visual state (position, size, text, color, texture), use the `set_property` tool (e.g. `set_property('HUD/Bar', 'size', [200, 20])`).
- Use `set_theme_override` for theme-specific settings like `font_size` or `font_color` on Control nodes.
- Use `add_node` for EVERYTHING visual. ONLY use scripts for behavior, never for static node creation.

## Scene & Resource File Integrity (CRITICAL)
- NEVER use `patch_script`, `edit_script`, or `replace_selection` on `.tscn`, `.tres`, or `.res` files. 
- These are structured data files that Godot must manage. Manual text-based patching WILL corrupt them.
- To modify a scene, you MUST use `add_node`, `remove_node`, or `set_property`.
- To modify a resource, you MUST use `create_resource` or specific node properties that reference them.
- However, you CAN safely use `create_script`, `patch_script`, and `edit_script` on other text-based files like `.md` (Markdown), `.json`, `.cfg`, and `.txt`.

## Script Editing Rules (CRITICAL)
- ALWAYS use `read_file` BEFORE editing any script. Never edit a file you haven't read in this conversation.
- To modify an existing script, PREFER using `patch_script` if you are only changing a small block of code. This is safer and more efficient.
- Only use `edit_script` if you need to rewrite the entire file or cannot uniquely identify the block to replace.
- Only use `create_script` for game logic (movement, health, etc.), configuration files (.cfg, .json), or documentation (.md, .txt).

## File Organization & Project Structure (CRITICAL)
- NEVER create files directly in the root directory (`res://`) unless it is a core config file.
- ALWAYS place new scripts, scenes, and resources in logically organized subdirectories (e.g., `res://ui/`, `res://components/`, `res://entities/`).

NEVER guess or hallucinate paths. Provide a complete, exact 1-to-1 dictionary map. New folders are created automatically by the tool.

## Project Memory (Persistent)

Always prefer `add_node`, `instance_scene`, and `set_property` over creating nodes via code for static scene elements and UI.

Only call it when the user EXPLICITLY asks to "index", "map", or "learn" the codebase. NEVER call it proactively or automatically after editing files.

- [fact_1779421787] (architecture) Skill System: SkillData (Resource) defines skill_id/name/cooldown/damage/scene/cast_distance/projectile_speed. SkillManager (Node) manages Array[SkillData] with per-skill cooldowns, emits cooldown_changed(skill_index,remaining,total). Both Player and Enemy use SkillManager. Player loads fireball_data.tres + sets scene via code (Resource refs don't persist). Enemy loads shadow_bolt_data.tres + sets scene=fireball.tscn + projectile_speed=250.

- [fact_1779460757] (architecture) SkillData v2: SkillType enum (PROJECTILE/BUFF/AOE/DASH). Common: skill_id, display_name, icon, description, cooldown, mp_cost. PROJECTILE: projectile_scene, projectile_speed, cast_distance, damage. BUFF: buff_resource (Buff), buff_duration. AOE: aoe_scene, aoe_radius. DASH: dash_distance, dash_speed. - [fact_1779468960] (architecture) Skill system uses layered architecture: SkillData (pure data), SkillPool (ID index with build() + map dict), SkillLoadout (slot鈫抯kill_id mapping), SkillExecutor (centralized compute_damage + execute), SkillManager (runtime orchestrator). Damage calculation is centralized in SkillExecutor.compute_damage() using formula: base_damage + magic_damage * damage_scaling. Player/Enemy no longer compute damage inline.
- [fact_1779468960] (convention) SkillData fields: id (primary), skill_id (deprecated alias), damage_scaling (float, magic coefficient), tags (Array[String] for modifier matching), cast_type (String), range (float). SkillData.get_id() returns id or falls back to skill_id. SkillPool.get_skill() uses O(1) map lookup, requires build() after loading.
- [fact_1779468960] (project_info) Skill file structure: skills/data/ (SkillData + .tres), skills/runtime/ (CastContext, SkillExecutor, SkillInstance), skills/registry/ (SkillPool + .tres), skills/loadout/ (SkillLoadout + .tres), skills/manager/ (SkillManager), skills/scenes/ (scene .tscn files). components/skill_manager.gd was moved to skills/manager/skill_manager.gd.
- [fact_1779469298] (architecture) Damage uses Modifier Pipeline: DamageContext (data carrier) 鈫?Array[DamageModifier].modify() 鈫?final_damage. SkillExecutor holds modifiers array, resolve_damage() runs pipeline. Core principle: "Damage isn't calculated 鈥?it's modified layer by layer." Three modifier types: StatScalingModifier (stat鈫抎amage), TagMultiplierModifier (tag-based %), FlatBonusModifier (flat +/-).
- [fact_1779469298] (convention) DamageModifier base class: Resource with required_tags, ignored_tags, enabled. should_apply() checks tag matching. Concrete modifiers in skills/modifiers/. Player/Enemy inject modifiers into SkillExecutor in _setup_damage_modifiers(). Modifiers execute in array order (first=first applied). StatScalingModifier reads ctx.skill.damage_scaling as effective ratio (per-skill tuning).
- [fact_1779469565] (architecture) DamageModifier uses staged execution: FLAT 鈫?MULTIPLY 鈫?OVERRIDE 鈫?FINAL. Each modifier declares its stage via `@export var stage: Stage` and priority within stage via `@export var priority: int`. SkillExecutor holds modifiers_by_stage dict, resolve_damage() runs _apply_stage() in fixed order. This eliminates the "who runs last wins" ordering bug 鈥?FLAT always before MULTIPLY, OVERRIDE always overrides everything.
- [fact_1779469565] (convention) Default stages: StatScalingModifier=FLAT, FlatBonusModifier=FLAT, TagMultiplierModifier=MULTIPLY. add_modifier() auto-sorts bucket by priority (ascending). remove_modifiers_of_class() works across all stages. modifiers getter provides flat array for backward compatibility.
- [fact_1779470013] (architecture) CombatEventBus is a global publish/subscribe system (systems/combat_event_bus.gd). Static singleton pattern via CombatEventBus.instance. Events: ON_CAST (SkillExecutor), ON_HIT (Projectile/FlameStorm), ON_DAMAGE/ON_KILL/ON_HEAL (HealthComponent). TriggeredEffect base class (systems/triggered_effect.gd) bridges events鈫抌ehavior with auto-register/unregister and cooldown support.
- [fact_1779470013] (convention) Event emission points: SkillExecutor._emit_event() after successful cast, Projectile._emit_hit_event() before take_damage, FlameStorm._emit_hit_event() before take_damage, HealthComponent._emit_damage_event()/_emit_kill_event() after damage/death. ON_HIT carries skill tags in data["tags"] for tag-based reactions.
- [fact_1779470346] (architecture) Condition System (systems/conditions/) provides intelligent filtering for TriggeredEffect. Base Condition class with evaluate(ctx)鈫抌ool and invert support. Concrete conditions: TagCondition (group check), StatusCondition (buff check), LowHPCondition (hp threshold), SkillTagCondition (skill tag check), TargetTypeCondition (player/enemy/boss). Conditions execute in array order (AND logic), fail-fast on first false.
- [fact_1779470346] (convention) TriggeredEffect upgraded with conditions Array, scope_source (skill/buff/equipment/global), max_recursion (depth limit for chain prevention). CombatEventBus has static _emit_depth counter incremented during emit(). Recursion guard: TriggeredEffect skips if _emit_depth > max_recursion. OnKillBonusExp uses create_for_player() factory with TargetTypeCondition. OnHitFireBonus demonstrates multi-condition chain (SkillTagCondition + TargetTypeCondition).
- [fact_1779470685] (architecture) Effect Graph system (systems/effect_graph/) enables composable node trees instead of flat rule lists. EffectNode base class with process(ctx). Flow nodes: SequenceNode (sequential children), BranchNode (if鈫抰rue/false), ConditionGateNode (condition鈫抪ass/skip), EmptyNode (terminal). Leaf nodes: CallableNode (wraps lambda), LogNode (debug). EffectGraph container holds root node, run(ev) creates EffectGraphContext and executes tree. TriggeredEffect upgraded with optional graph field 鈥?when set, graph mode replaces flat conditions+_execute.
- [fact_1779470685] (convention) Graph demo in player.gd: ON_HIT fire skill 鈫?ConditionGate(fire) 鈫?Branch(IsBoss 鈫?BossLog, NormalLog). EffectGraphContext carries event/source/target/skill/data with halt() for early termination and store dict for inter-node communication. All nodes are Resources (can be .tres), enabling data-driven graph construction in editor.
- [fact_1779471319] (architecture) Single Authority Rule enforced: CombatExecutor is the sole event emission authority. All systems (SkillExecutor, Projectile, FlameStorm, HealthComponent) route through CombatExecutor.report_*() static methods instead of directly accessing CombatEventBus. CombatExecutor enforces phase gating (_can_emit_in_phase), depth firewall (MAX_EVENT_DEPTH=3), and chain firewall (MAX_CHAIN_LENGTH=5). CombatEventBus has hard MAX_DEPTH_HARD=5 limit.
- [fact_1779471319] (convention) CombatPhase enum: IDLE鈫扞NPUT鈫扖ONDITION鈫扢ODIFIER鈫扙FFECT鈫扙VENT鈫扨OST. CombatScope enum: SKILL/BATTLE/GLOBAL. CombatExecutor.current_phase tracks active phase. Cross-phase calls are rejected. Modifier Pipeline (ONLY values), Event Bus (ONLY broadcast), Condition System (ONLY bool), Effect Graph (ONLY behavior). No system may cross layers.
- [fact_1779471790] (architecture) Combat Trace System (systems/debug/) provides observability into every combat step. CombatTraceEvent records category/phase/input/output/metadata. CombatTrace collects events for one chain with query methods (find_by_category, get_damage_chain). CombatDebugger is static storage (MAX_TRACES=50) with begin/active/store/get_last/find_by_skill/replay_step/summarize. CombatDebugUI is a toggleable (~ key) panel showing BBCode-formatted trace with color-coded events.
- [fact_1779471790] (convention) Trace integration: SkillExecutor.execute() calls CombatDebugger.begin(), resolve_damage() records per-modifier before/after deltas, execute() stores on completion. CombatExecutor._enforce_emit() records EVENT_EMIT and FIREWALL_BLOCK. CombatDebugger.enabled is auto-set in OS.is_debug_build(). Trace recording is zero-cost when disabled 鈥?all calls check enabled flag first.
- [fact_1779472258] (bug_fix) Bug fixes: (1) BuffManager now has has_buff(name) method for StatusCondition lookup. (2) CombatExecutor._can_emit_in_phase() allows IDLE phase (default before phase tracking is activated), preventing all events from being silently dropped. (3) SkillExecutor.execute() calls CombatExecutor.instance.reset_chain() at start to prevent chain_count overflow after 5 casts. (4) OnHitFireBonus._execute() now checks target is alive and routes through HealthComponent directly to avoid re-entrant ON_HIT cascade. (5) EffectGraph.from_flat() removed unused trigger_type parameter.

class_name SkillPool
extends Resource
## 鎶€鑳芥睜 鈥?ID 绱㈠紩琛紝鎻忚堪"鏈夊摢浜沑"
## 鎶€鑳芥暟鎹殑娉ㄥ唽涓績锛屾敮鎸?O(1) ID 鏌ユ壘
## 姣忎釜鐜╁/NPC 鎷ユ湁涓€涓?SkillPool 瀹炰緥 (.tres)

@export var skills: Array[SkillData] = []

## 鈹€鈹€ 鍐呴儴绱㈠紩锛圤(1) 鏌ユ壘锛?鈹€鈹€
var map: Dictionary = {}


## 鏋勫缓 ID 绱㈠紩琛紙鍔犺浇鎶€鑳藉悗蹇呴』璋冪敤锛塡nfunc build() -> void:
	map.clear()
	for s in skills:
		if s:
			var key := s.get_id()
			if not key.is_empty():
				map[key] = s


## 閫氳繃 id 鏌ユ壘锛圤(1)锛塡nfunc get_skill(skill_id: String) -> SkillData:
	return map.get(skill_id, null)


## 娣诲姞鎶€鑳藉埌姹犱腑锛堣嚜鍔ㄦ洿鏂扮储寮曪級
func add_skill(skill: SkillData) -> void:
	if not skill:
		return
	var key := skill.get_id()
	if key.is_empty():
		return
	if map.has(key):
		return
	skills.append(skill)
	map[key] = skill


## 绉婚櫎鎶€鑳斤紙鑷姩鏇存柊绱㈠紩锛塡nfunc remove_skill(skill_id: String) -> void:
	if not map.has(skill_id):
		return
	map.erase(skill_id)
	for i in range(skills.size()):
		if skills[i] and skills[i].get_id() == skill_id:
			skills.remove_at(i)
			return


## 鏄惁宸插浼歕nfunc has_skill(skill_id: String) -> bool:
	return map.has(skill_id)


## 鑾峰彇鎵€鏈夊凡娉ㄥ唽 id
func get_all_ids() -> Array[String]:
	return map.keys()


## 姹犲ぇ灏廫nfunc size() -> int:
	return map.size()
","role":"tool","tool_call_id":"call_00_QQgFxGCktd4cIL1xe1aB6902"},{"content":"Content of res://skills/manager/skill_manager.gd:
class_name SkillManager
extends Node
## 鎶€鑳界鐞嗗櫒 鈥?绾繍琛屾€侊紝鎻忚堪"鎬庝箞瑁呭"
## 宸︽墜/鍙虫墜 + 4 蹇嵎閿Ы浣峔n## 鎵ц閫昏緫濮旀墭缁?SkillExecutor

const MAX_SLOTS := 4

## 鈹€鈹€ 淇″彿 鈹€鈹€
signal hand_changed(hand: String)          ## "left" / "right"
signal slot_changed(slot_index: int)
signal cooldown_changed(source: String, remaining: float, total: float)
signal skill_used(source: String, skill: SkillData)

## 鈹€鈹€ 鏍稿績渚濊禆 鈹€鈹€
var pool: SkillPool = null                 ## 鎶€鑳芥睜锛圛D绱㈠紩锛塡nvar executor: SkillExecutor = null         ## 鎵ц鍣紙璁＄畻+鎵ц锛塡n
## 鈹€鈹€ 宸﹀彸鎵嬶紙SkillInstance 鍖呰锛?鈹€鈹€
var left_hand: SkillInstance = null
var right_hand: SkillInstance = null

## 鈹€鈹€ 蹇嵎閿Ы浣?鈹€鈹€
var _slots: Array[SkillInstance] = []

## 鈹€鈹€ 鍐峰嵈锛堢粺涓€瀛楀吀锛宻ource 鈫?remaining锛?鈹€鈹€
var _cooldowns: Dictionary = {}


func _ready() -> void:
	_slots.resize(MAX_SLOTS)
	for i in range(MAX_SLOTS):
		_slots[i] = null
	# 鑷姩鍒涘缓 executor锛堝鏋滄湭浠庡閮ㄦ敞鍏ワ級
	if not executor:
		executor = SkillExecutor.new()
		executor.name = "SkillExecutor"
		add_child(executor)


func _process(delta: float) -> void:
	# 鏇存柊鎵€鏈?SkillInstance 鍐峰嵈
	_tick_instance(left_hand, delta)
	_tick_instance(right_hand, delta)
	for i in range(MAX_SLOTS):
		_tick_instance(_slots[i], delta)

	# 鏇存柊 _cooldowns 骞跺彂灏勪俊鍙烽€氱煡 UI
	for key in _cooldowns:
		var cd: float = _cooldowns[key]
		if cd > 0.0:
			cd = maxf(0.0, cd - delta)
			_cooldowns[key] = cd
			cooldown_changed.emit(key, cd, _get_cooldown_total(key))


func _tick_instance(inst: SkillInstance, delta: float) -> void:
	if inst:
		inst.tick(delta)


## 鈹€鈹€ Loadout 搴旂敤锛堟帹鑽愬叆鍙ｏ級 鈹€鈹€

func apply_loadout(loadout: SkillLoadout) -> void:
	if not loadout:
		return
	if loadout.left_hand and pool:
		equip_hand("left", pool.get_skill(loadout.left_hand))
	if loadout.right_hand and pool:
		equip_hand("right", pool.get_skill(loadout.right_hand))
	for i in range(mini(loadout.slots.size(), MAX_SLOTS)):
		var sid := loadout.slots[i]
		if sid and pool:
			equip_slot(i, pool.get_skill(sid))


## 鈹€鈹€ 瑁呭绠＄悊 鈹€鈹€

func equip_hand(hand: String, skill: SkillData) -> void:
	var inst := SkillInstance.new(skill) if skill else null
	match hand:
		"left":  left_hand = inst
		"right": right_hand = inst
	hand_changed.emit(hand)


func unequip_hand(hand: String) -> SkillData:
	var old: SkillData = null
	match hand:
		"left":
			if left_hand: old = left_hand.data
			left_hand = null
		"right":
			if right_hand: old = right_hand.data
			right_hand = null
	hand_changed.emit(hand)
	return old


func equip_slot(idx: int, skill: SkillData) -> void:
	if idx < 0 or idx >= MAX_SLOTS:
		return
	_slots[idx] = SkillInstance.new(skill) if skill else null
	slot_changed.emit(idx)


func unequip_slot(idx: int) -> SkillData:
	if idx < 0 or idx >= MAX_SLOTS:
		return null
	var old: SkillData = _slots[idx].data if _slots[idx] else null
	_slots[idx] = null
	slot_changed.emit(idx)
	return old


## 鈹€鈹€ 鏌ヨ 鈹€鈹€

func get_slot(idx: int) -> SkillInstance:
	if idx < 0 or idx >= MAX_SLOTS:
		return null
	return _slots[idx]


func has_left_spell() -> bool:
	return left_hand != null


func has_right_spell() -> bool:
	return right_hand != null


func can_use(source: String) -> bool:
	return _cooldowns.get(source, 0.0) <= 0.0


func get_cooldown(source: String) -> float:
	return _cooldowns.get(source, 0.0)


func get_cooldown_total(source: String) -> float:
	return _get_cooldown_total(source)


## 鈹€鈹€ 閲婃斁锛堝鎵樼粰 SkillExecutor锛?鈹€鈹€

func use_hand(hand: String, caster: Node2D, direction: Vector2) -> bool:
	var inst: SkillInstance = left_hand if hand == "left" else right_hand
	if not inst or not inst.data:
		return false
	return _execute(inst.data, hand, caster, direction)


func use_slot(idx: int, caster: Node2D, direction: Vector2) -> bool:
	if idx < 0 or idx >= MAX_SLOTS:
		return false
	var inst := _slots[idx]
	if not inst or not inst.data:
		return false
	return _execute(inst.data, "slot_%d" % idx, caster, direction)


## 鈹€鈹€ 鍐呴儴鎵ц锛堝鎵樼粰 SkillExecutor锛?鈹€鈹€

func _execute(skill: SkillData, source: String, caster: Node2D, direction: Vector2) -> bool:
	# 鍐峰嵈妫€鏌n	var inst := _find_instance(source)
	if inst and not inst.is_ready():
		return false

	# MP 妫€鏌n	var mana := caster.get_node_or_null("ManaComponent") as ManaComponent
	if mana and skill.mp_cost > 0 and not mana.use_mp(skill.mp_cost):
		return false

	# 濮旀墭缁?SkillExecutor
	var ctx := CastContext.simple(caster, direction, skill)
	var ok := executor.execute(skill, ctx)

	if not ok:
		if mana and skill.mp_cost > 0:
			mana.restore_mp(skill.mp_cost)
		return false

	# 瑙﹀彂鍐峰嵈
	if inst:
		inst.trigger_cooldown()
	_cooldowns[source] = skill.cooldown
	cooldown_changed.emit(source, skill.cooldown, skill.cooldown)
	skill_used.emit(source, skill)
	return true


func _find_instance(source: String) -> SkillInstance:
	match source:
		"left":  return left_hand
		"right": return right_hand
	var idx := source.trim_prefix("slot_").to_int()
	if idx >= 0 and idx < MAX_SLOTS:
		return _slots[idx]
	return null


## 鈹€鈹€ 鍐峰嵈鍐呴儴 鈹€鈹€

func _get_cooldown_total(source: String) -> float:
	var inst := _find_instance(source)
	if inst and inst.data:
		return inst.data.cooldown
	return 1.0


## 鈹€鈹€ 鍒濆鍖栵紙鍏煎鏃?API锛?鈹€鈹€

func initialize(pool_res: SkillPool) -> void:
	pool = pool_res
	pool.build()
	for i in range(MAX_SLOTS):
		_slots[i] = null
		if pool_res and i < pool_res.skills.size():
			_slots[i] = SkillInstance.new(pool_res.skills[i])
			slot_changed.emit(i)
","role":"tool","tool_call_id":"call_01_QHPewCsGY3R0h22pxQpA1433"},{"content":"Content of res://skills/loadout/skill_loadout.gd:
class_name SkillLoadout
extends Resource
## 鎶€鑳借澶囨槧灏勮〃 鈥?妲戒綅 鈫?skill_id
## 鏈川鏄痋"瑁呭鍝嚑涓妧鑳絓"鐨勭函鏁版嵁锛屼笉鎸佹湁 SkillData 寮曠敤
## 杩愯鏃剁敱 SkillManager 閫氳繃 SkillPool 瑙ｆ瀽 skill_id 鈫?SkillData

## 鈹€鈹€ 宸﹀彸鎵?鈹€鈹€
@export var left_hand: String = ""
@export var right_hand: String = ""

## 鈹€鈹€ 蹇嵎閿Ы浣嶏紙4涓級 鈹€鈹€
@export var slots: Array[String] = []


## 蹇嵎鏋勯€狅細鍏ㄩ儴鎸囧畾
static func create(left: String, right: String, slot_ids: Array[String] = []) -> SkillLoadout:
	var lo := SkillLoadout.new()
	lo.left_hand = left
	lo.right_hand = right
	lo.slots = slot_ids
	return lo


## 鏄惁涓虹┖锛堟湭瑁呭浠讳綍鎶€鑳斤級
func is_empty() -> bool:
	if not left_hand.is_empty():
		return false
	if not right_hand.is_empty():
		return false
	for s in slots:
		if not s.is_empty():
			return false
	return true

extends CharacterBody2D
class_name Player

## 鈹€鈹€ 绉诲姩鍩虹鍊硷紙鏈€缁堥€熷害 = 鍩虹 + 鏁忔嵎鍔犳垚锛?鈹€鈹€

## 鈹€鈹€ 鑳屽寘 鈹€鈹€
@export var inventory: Inventory
var inventory_panel: InventoryPanel
var skill_pool_ui: SkillPoolUI = null
var _skill_pool: SkillPool = null

## 鈹€鈹€ 璋冭瘯 鈹€鈹€
@export var debug_items: bool = false

## 鈹€鈹€ 淇″彿锛圚UD 璁㈤槄锛?鈹€鈹€
signal health_changed(current_hp: int, max_hp: int)

## 鈹€鈹€ 鏈濆悜 鈹€鈹€
var facing_direction: Vector2 = Vector2.DOWN

## 鈹€鈹€ 鑺傜偣寮曠敤 鈹€鈹€
@onready var sprite: Sprite2D = $Sprite2D
@onready var collision_shape: CollisionShape2D = $CollisionShape2D

@onready var combat_component: CombatComponent = $CombatComponent
@onready var skill_manager: SkillManager = $SkillManager
@onready var stats_component: StatsComponent = $StatsComponent
var mana_component: ManaComponent = null

## 鈹€鈹€ 寰呴噴鏀剧殑鎶€鑳芥潵婧愶紙"slot_N"锛屼粎蹇嵎閿敤锛?鈹€鈹€
var pending_skill_source: String = ""
## 鈹€鈹€ 鐬勫噯鐘舵€侊紙璺ㄧ姸鎬佷繚鎸侊級 鈹€鈹€

func _ready() -> void:

	_setup_event_bus()

	sprite.z_as_relative = false
	sprite.z_index = 10

	# 鑳屽寘闈㈡澘

## 杩借釜涓婁竴娆″睘鎬ф帹瀵煎€硷紝鐢ㄤ簬澧為噺搴旂敤锛堜繚鐣欒澶囧姞鎴愪笉琚鐩栵級
var _last_stat_hp: int = 0
var _last_stat_mp: int = 0
var _last_stat_dmg: int = 0
var _last_stat_speed: float = 0.0


func _apply_stats() -> void:
	stats_component._recalculate_all()

	var new_hp := 50 + stats_component.max_hp_bonus
	var new_mp := stats_component.max_mana
	var new_dmg := 10 + stats_component.physical_damage
	var new_speed := base_move_speed + stats_component.move_speed_bonus

	if _last_stat_hp == 0:
		# 棣栨璋冪敤锛氱粷瀵硅祴鍊糪n		health_component.max_hp = new_hp
		mana_component.max_mp = new_mp
		combat_component.attack_damage = new_dmg
		move_speed = new_speed
	else:
		# 鍚庣画璋冪敤锛氬彧搴旂敤宸€硷紝淇濈暀瑁呭绛夊閮ㄥ姞鎴怽n		health_component.max_hp += new_hp - _last_stat_hp
		mana_component.max_mp += new_mp - _last_stat_mp
		combat_component.attack_damage += new_dmg - _last_stat_dmg
		move_speed += new_speed - _last_stat_speed

	health_component.hp = clampi(health_component.hp, 1, health_component.max_hp)
	mana_component.mp = clampi(mana_component.mp, 0, mana_component.max_mp)

	_last_stat_hp = new_hp
	_last_stat_mp = new_mp
	_last_stat_dmg = new_dmg
	_last_stat_speed = new_speed


func _on_stat_changed(_stat_name: String, _new_value: int) -> void:
	_apply_stats()
	health_changed.emit(health_component.hp, health_component.max_hp)
	mp_changed.emit(mana_component.mp, mana_component.max_mp)

		var fireball := load("res://skills/data/fireball_data.tres") as SkillData

## 婕旂ず EffectGraph锛歄N_HIT 鈫?鐏劙鎶€鑳藉垎鏀痋nfunc _register_graph_demo() -> void:
	# 鏉′欢1: 鎶€鑳藉繀椤绘槸鐏劙鏍囩
	var fire_cond := SkillTagCondition.new()
	fire_cond.required_skill_tag = "fire"

	# 鏉′欢2: 鐩爣蹇呴』鏄?Boss
	var boss_cond := TargetTypeCondition.new()
	boss_cond.target_is_boss = true
	boss_cond.target_is_player = false
	boss_cond.target_is_enemy = true

	# 鏁堟灉鑺傜偣
	var boss_log := LogNode.new()
	boss_log.message = "馃敟 Boss 琚伀鐒板懡涓紒瑙﹀彂浜屾浼ゅ锛乗"
	boss_log.node_name = "BossFireHit"

	var normal_log := LogNode.new()
	normal_log.message = "馃敟 鐏劙鍛戒腑"
	normal_log.node_name = "NormalFireHit"

	# 鍒嗘敮: if FireSkill AND Boss 鈫?BossLog, else 鈫?NormalLog
	var fire_gate := ConditionGateNode.new()
	fire_gate.condition = fire_cond
	fire_gate.node_name = "Gate:IsFire"

	var boss_branch := BranchNode.new()
	boss_branch.condition = boss_cond
	boss_branch.true_branch = boss_log
	boss_branch.false_branch = normal_log
	boss_branch.node_name = "Branch:IsBoss"

	fire_gate.child = boss_branch

	# 鏋勫缓鍥綷n	var graph := EffectGraph.new()
	graph.root = fire_gate

	# 鍒涘缓 TriggeredEffect 鍖呰
	var effect := TriggeredEffect.new()
	effect.trigger_type = CombatEvent.Type.ON_HIT
	effect.graph = graph
	effect.scope_source = "skill"
	effect.max_recursion = 0

	call_deferred("_register_triggered_effects_deferred", effect)


func _register_triggered_effects_deferred(effect: TriggeredEffect) -> void:
	effect.register()
	print("馃 宸叉敞鍐?EffectGraph: ", effect.graph.root.node_name if effect.graph else "(flat)")
