class_name CombatDebugUI
extends Control
## 鎴樻枟璋冭瘯UI 鈥?鏄剧ず鏈€杩戜竴娆℃垬鏂楄拷韪猏n## 
## 娣诲姞鍒板満鏅腑锛屾寜 ~ 閿垏鎹㈡樉绀篭n
@export var toggle_key: Key = KEY_QUOTELEFT          ## ~ 閿甛n
var _panel: PanelContainer
var _label: RichTextLabel
var _visible := false


func _ready() -> void:
	_setup_ui()
	hide()


func _input(event: InputEvent) -> void:
	if event is InputEventKey and event.pressed and event.keycode == toggle_key:
		_visible = not _visible
		visible = _visible
		if _visible:
			_refresh()


func _setup_ui() -> void:
	anchor_right = 0.35
	anchor_bottom = 0.7
	offset_left = 10
	offset_top = 10

	_panel = PanelContainer.new()
	_panel.set_anchors_preset(Control.PRESET_FULL_RECT)
	add_child(_panel)

	var style := StyleBoxFlat.new()
	style.bg_color = Color(0.05, 0.05, 0.08, 0.92)
	style.border_width_left = 2
	style.border_width_right = 2
	style.border_width_top = 2
	style.border_width_bottom = 2
	style.border_color = Color(0.3, 0.6, 1.0, 0.5)
	style.corner_radius_top_left = 6
	style.corner_radius_top_right = 6
	style.corner_radius_bottom_left = 6
	style.corner_radius_bottom_right = 6
	_panel.add_theme_stylebox_override("panel", style)

	var vbox := VBoxContainer.new()
	vbox.add_theme_constant_override("separation", 4)
	_panel.add_child(vbox)

	# 鏍囬
	var title := Label.new()
	title.text = "鈿旓笍 Combat Debugger"
	title.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 14)
	title.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(0.3, 0.8, 1.0))
	vbox.add_child(title)

	# 鍐呭
	_label = RichTextLabel.new()
	_label.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
	_label.size_flags_vertical = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
	_label.bbcode_enabled = true
	_label.fit_content = true
	_label.scroll_following = true
	vbox.add_child(_label)

	# 鎸夐挳鏍廫n	var hbox := HBoxContainer.new()
	vbox.add_child(hbox)

	var refresh_btn := Button.new()
	refresh_btn.text = "馃攧 Refresh"
	refresh_btn.pressed.connect(_refresh)
	hbox.add_child(refresh_btn)

	var clear_btn := Button.new()
	clear_btn.text = "馃棏锔?Clear"
	clear_btn.pressed.connect(_on_clear)
	hbox.add_child(clear_btn)

	var toggle_trace_btn := Button.new()
	toggle_trace_btn.text = "鈴笍 Toggle Trace"
	toggle_trace_btn.pressed.connect(_on_toggle_trace)
	hbox.add_child(toggle_trace_btn)


func _refresh() -> void:
	var trace := CombatDebugger.get_last()
	if not trace:
		_label.text = "[color=gray](no traces recorded)[/color]"
		return

	var bbcode := ""
	bbcode += "[b]%s[/b] | Events: %d | Damage: [color=yellow]%d[/color]\n\n" % [
		trace.skill_name, trace.events.size(), trace.final_damage
	]

	var i := 1
	for ev in trace.events:
		var color := _color_for_category(ev.category)
		var prefix := "[color=%s]%2d.[/color]" % [color, i]

		match ev.category:
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.FIREWALL_BLOCK:
				bbcode += "%s [color=red]馃毇 BLOCKED[/color] %s\n" % [prefix, ev.event_name]
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY:
				var delta: int = ev.metadata.get("delta", 0)
				var sign := "+" if delta >= 0 else ""
				bbcode += "%s [color=cyan]馃搳 %s[/color]: %d 鈫?%d ([color=%s]%s%d[/color])\n" % [
					prefix, ev.event_name,
					ev.input_data.get("damage", 0),
					ev.output_data.get("damage", 0),
					"lime" if delta >= 0 else "red", sign, delta
				]
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.CONDITION_CHECK:
				var r: bool = ev.output_data.get("result", false)
				bbcode += "%s [color=orange]馃攳 %s[/color]: [color=%s]%s[/color]\n" % [
					prefix, ev.event_name,
					"lime" if r else "gray", "PASS" if r else "FAIL"
				]
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.EVENT_EMIT:
				bbcode += "%s [color=magenta]馃摗 %s[/color] 鈫?%s\n" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.target]
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.DAMAGE_RESOLVE:
				bbcode += "%s [color=yellow]馃挜 %s[/color] base=%d\n" % [
					prefix, ev.event_name, ev.input_data.get("base_damage", 0)
				]
			_:
				bbcode += "%s %s\n" % [prefix, ev.event_name]
		i += 1

	# 浼ゅ閾炬€荤粨
	bbcode += "\n[color=gray]Chain: %s[/color]" % trace.get_damage_chain()

	_label.text = bbcode


func _color_for_category(cat: CombatTraceEvent.Category) -> String:
	match cat:
		CombatTraceEvent.Category.FIREWALL_BLOCK: return "red"
		CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY: return "cyan"
		CombatTraceEvent.Category.CONDITION_CHECK: return "orange"
		CombatTraceEvent.Category.EVENT_EMIT: return "magenta"
		CombatTraceEvent.Category.DAMAGE_RESOLVE: return "yellow"
		_: return "white"


func _on_clear() -> void:
	CombatDebugger.clear()
	_label.text = "[color=gray](cleared)[/color]"


func _on_toggle_trace() -> void:
	CombatDebugger.enabled = not CombatDebugger.enabled
	print("馃搳 CombatDebugger enabled: ", CombatDebugger.enabled)
	_label.text = "[color=gray]Tracing: %s[/color]" % ("ON" if CombatDebugger.enabled else "OFF")

But first, let me check the health_component.gd to see how the reporting chain works there.","role":"assistant","tool_calls":[{"function":{"arguments":"{"path": "res://components/health_component.gd"}","name":"read_file"},"id":"call_00_AdEgsslN7Gei836uidoV1686","type":"function"},{"function":{"arguments":"{"path": "res://systems/triggered_effect.gd"}","name":"read_file"},"id":"call_01_Fo4jZyFRSu7USgkeigWS8754","type":"function"},{"function":{"arguments":"{"path": "res://systems/on_kill_bonus_exp.gd"}","name":"read_file"},"id":"call_02_iodXVxHoM08BeKjP7Ayi4409","type":"function"}]},{"content":"Content of res://components/health_component.gd:
class_name HealthComponent
extends Node
## 鐢熷懡鍊肩粍浠?鈥?HP/鍙椾激/鏃犳晫/姝讳骸/鑷洖
## Player 鍜?Enemy 鍏辩敤锛屾寕杞戒负瀛愯妭鐐瑰嵆鍙痋n
## 灞炴€n@export var max_hp: int = 100
@export var invincible_duration: float = 0.5
@export var regen_delay: float = 5.0
@export var regen_rate: float = 3.0

## 淇″彿
signal health_changed(current_hp: int, max_hp: int)
signal died

## 杩愯鏃剁姸鎬乗nvar hp: int = 100
var invincible: bool = false
var is_dead: bool = false
var _time_since_damage: float = 0.0
var _regen_accumulator: float = 0.0

## 鍏宠仈鐨勭鎾炰綋锛堟浜℃椂绂佺敤锛塡nvar _collision_shape: CollisionShape2D = null


func setup(shape: CollisionShape2D) -> void:
	_collision_shape = shape
	hp = max_hp


func _process(delta: float) -> void:
	# 鑴辨垬鑷洖
	if is_dead or hp >= max_hp:
		return
	_time_since_damage += delta
	if _time_since_damage >= regen_delay:
		_regen_accumulator += regen_rate * delta
		var heal_amt := int(_regen_accumulator)
		if heal_amt > 0:
			_regen_accumulator -= heal_amt
			hp = mini(max_hp, hp + heal_amt)
			health_changed.emit(hp, max_hp)


func take_damage(amount: int) -> void:
	if invincible:
		return

	hp = maxi(0, hp - amount)
	_time_since_damage = 0.0
	health_changed.emit(hp, max_hp)

	# 鍙戝皠 ON_DAMAGE 浜嬩欢锛堜激瀹冲凡搴旂敤锛塡n	_emit_damage_event(amount)

	if hp <= 0:
		is_dead = true
		# 鍙戝皠 ON_KILL 浜嬩欢锛堝湪 died 淇″彿涔嬪墠锛塡n		_emit_kill_event(amount)
		died.emit()
		if _collision_shape:
			_collision_shape.set_deferred("disabled", true)
		return

	invincible = true
	await get_tree().create_timer(invincible_duration).timeout
	invincible = false


func heal(amount: int) -> void:
	hp = mini(max_hp, hp + amount)
	health_changed.emit(hp, max_hp)
	_emit_heal_event(amount)


## 鈹€鈹€ 浜嬩欢鍙戝皠 鈫?CombatExecutor锛堝敮涓€鏉冨▉鍏ュ彛锛?鈹€鈹€

func _emit_damage_event(amount: int) -> void:
	CombatExecutor.report_damage(get_parent(), amount, hp)


func _emit_kill_event(amount: int) -> void:
	var parent := get_parent()
	var pos: Vector2 = parent.get("global_position") if "global_position" in parent else Vector2.ZERO
	CombatExecutor.report_kill(parent, amount, pos)


func _emit_heal_event(amount: int) -> void:
	# 娌荤枟浜嬩欢鏆備笉璧?CombatExecutor 涓ユ牸闂ㄦ帶
	var bus := CombatEventBus.instance
	if not bus:
		return
	var ev := CombatEvent.new()
	ev.type = CombatEvent.Type.ON_HEAL
	ev.target = get_parent()
	ev.data["amount"] = amount
	bus.emit(ev)

class_name TriggeredEffect
extends Resource
## 瑙﹀彂寮忔晥鏋?鈥?Event + Condition + Effect 鐨勫畬鏁撮棴鐜痋n## 
## 鏀寔涓ょ妯″紡锛歕n##   1. 绠€鍗曟ā寮忥細conditions[] + _execute()锛堝悜鍚庡吋瀹癸級
##   2. 鍥炬ā寮忥細graph: EffectGraph锛堢粍鍚堣妭鐐规爲锛塡n## 
## 褰?graph 涓嶄负 null 鏃讹紝浼樺厛浣跨敤鍥炬ā寮廫n
## 鈹€鈹€ 閰嶇疆 鈹€鈹€

## 鐩戝惉鐨勪簨浠剁被鍨媆n@export var trigger_type: CombatEvent.Type = CombatEvent.Type.ON_KILL

## 鈹€鈹€ 绠€鍗曟ā寮忥紙鍚戝悗鍏煎锛?鈹€鈹€
## 瑙﹀彂鏉′欢锛圓ND 閫昏緫锛屽叏閮ㄦ弧瓒虫墠鎵ц锛塡n@export var conditions: Array[Condition] = []

## 鈹€鈹€ 鍥炬ā寮忥紙浼樺厛锛?鈹€鈹€
## 鏁堟灉鍥?鈥?鑺傜偣缁勫悎鐨勫畬鏁存墽琛屾爲
@export var graph: EffectGraph = null

## 鏄惁鍚敤
@export var enabled: bool = true

## 鍐峰嵈锛堢锛?=鏃犲喎鍗达級
@export var cooldown: float = 0.0

## 鈹€鈹€ 浣滅敤鍩熸帶鍒讹紙闃查€掑綊鐖嗙偢锛?鈹€鈹€

## 浣滅敤鍩熸潵婧愶細skill / buff / equipment / global
@export var scope_source: String = "skill"

## 鏈€澶ч€掑綊娣卞害锛?=涓嶅厑璁搁摼寮忚Е鍙戯紝1=鍏佽瑙﹀彂1灞傛柊浜嬩欢锛塡n@export var max_recursion: int = 0

## 鈹€鈹€ 杩愯鏃?鈹€鈹€
var _last_trigger_time: float = -INF


## 娉ㄥ唽鍒颁簨浠舵€荤嚎
func register() -> void:
	CombatEventBus.subscribe_static(trigger_type, _on_event)


## 浠庝簨浠舵€荤嚎娉ㄩ攢
func unregister() -> void:
	if CombatEventBus.instance:
		CombatEventBus.instance.unsubscribe(trigger_type, _on_event)


## 鍐呴儴鍥炶皟锛氬喎鍗?鈫?閫掑綊瀹堝崼 鈫?鏉′欢/鍥?鈫?鎵ц
func _on_event(ev: CombatEvent) -> void:
	if not enabled:
		return

	# 閫掑綊瀹堝崼锛氳秴鍑烘繁搴︿笂闄愬垯璺宠繃
	if CombatEventBus._emit_depth > max_recursion:
		return

	# 鍐峰嵈妫€鏌n	if cooldown > 0:
		var now := Time.get_ticks_msec() / 1000.0
		if now - _last_trigger_time < cooldown:
			return
		_last_trigger_time = now

	# 馃啎 鍥炬ā寮忥細浼樺厛
	if graph and graph.root:
		graph.run(ev)
		return

	# 绠€鍗曟ā寮忥細鏉′欢 鈫?鎵ц
	var ctx := _build_context(ev)
	for cond in conditions:
		if cond and not cond.check(ctx):
			return

	_execute(ev)


## 鏋勫缓鏉′欢璇勪及涓婁笅鏂嘰nfunc _build_context(ev: CombatEvent) -> Dictionary:
	return {
		"event": ev,
		"source": ev.source,
		"target": ev.target,
		"skill": ev.skill,
		"data": ev.data,
		"depth": CombatEventBus._emit_depth,
	}


## 瀛愮被瑕嗗啓锛氬搷搴斾簨浠剁殑鍏蜂綋閫昏緫锛堜粎绠€鍗曟ā寮忥級
func _execute(ev: CombatEvent) -> void:
	pass

class_name OnKillBonusExp
extends TriggeredEffect
## 鍑绘潃棰濆缁忛獙 鈥?婕旂ず Event + Condition + Effect 瀹屾暣闂幆
## 
## 榛樿鏉′欢锛氱洰鏍囧繀椤绘槸 enemy 缁勶紙閫氳繃 TargetTypeCondition锛塡n## 鍙€氳繃 conditions 鏁扮粍鍙犲姞鏇村鏉′欢

@export var bonus_exp: int = 15


## 闈欐€佸伐鍘傦細鍒涘缓甯﹂粯璁ゆ潯浠剁殑瀹炰緥
static func create_for_player(exp: int = 15) -> OnKillBonusExp:
	var effect := OnKillBonusExp.new()
	effect.bonus_exp = exp
	effect.trigger_type = CombatEvent.Type.ON_KILL
	effect.scope_source = "global"
	effect.max_recursion = 0

	# 鏉′欢锛氬彧瀵瑰嚮鏉€鏁屼汉瑙﹀彂
	var cond := TargetTypeCondition.new()
	cond.target_is_enemy = true
	cond.target_is_player = false
	effect.conditions = [cond]

	return effect


func _execute(ev: CombatEvent) -> void:
	# 鍑绘潃濂栧姳鍙戞斁缁欑帺瀹禱n	var player := ev.target.get_tree().get_first_node_in_group("player") as Player
	if not player or not player.stats_component:
		return

	player.stats_component.add_experience(bonus_exp)
	print("鈿?[OnKillBonusExp] +%d 棰濆缁忛獙 (target=%s, conditions=%d passed)" % [
		bonus_exp, ev.target.name, conditions.size()
	])

## Skill Execution Flow (Complete)

### 1. Input 鈫?State Machine
- Player input: Left-click (fireball/melee), Right-click (ice_armor), 1 (flame_storm), 2 (shadow_step)
- PlayerSkillState receives the pending_skill_source and calls cast_hand() or cast_slot()

### 2. cast_hand/cast_slot 鈫?SkillManager
- `skill_manager.use_hand(hand, self, get_mouse_direction())` or `skill_manager.use_slot(idx, self, get_mouse_direction())`
- SkillManager._execute() checks cooldown via SkillInstance.is_ready(), checks MP via ManaComponent

### 3. SkillManager 鈫?SkillExecutor
- Creates CastContext.simple(caster, direction, skill)
- Calls `executor.execute(skill, ctx)`
- SkillExecutor.execute() dispatches by skill_type:
  - PROJECTILE 鈫?_execute_projectile
  - BUFF 鈫?_execute_buff
  - AOE 鈫?_execute_aoe
  - DASH 鈫?_execute_dash

### 4. Damage Resolution (for PROJECTILE and AOE)
- resolve_damage() creates DamageContext.from_cast()
- Runs FLAT 鈫?MULTIPLY 鈫?OVERRIDE 鈫?FINAL stages
- Each modifier transforms final_damage

### 5. Event Emission
- After execution, _emit_event() 鈫?CombatExecutor.report_cast()
- CombatExecutor._enforce_emit() checks depth/chain/phase
- Delegates to CombatEventBus.emit()

### 6. Projectile/AOE Hit
- Projectile._on_body_entered() 鈫?CombatExecutor.report_hit()
- FlameStorm._on_body_entered() 鈫?CombatExecutor.report_hit()
- Then calls target.take_damage()

### 7. HealthComponent
- take_damage() 鈫?CombatExecutor.report_damage()
- If dead 鈫?CombatExecutor.report_kill()

### 8. Triggered Effects
- OnKillBonusExp subscribed to ON_KILL 鈫?gives player bonus exp

## Debug System
- CombatDebugger.enabled = true (set in player.gd if OS.is_debug_build())
- SkillExecutor.execute() calls CombatDebugger.begin() and CombatDebugger.store()
- CombatExecutor._enforce_emit() records trace events via CombatDebugger.active()
- CombatDebugUI (~ key) displays the last trace

## Potential Issues I Can See:

1. **BUFF skills don't use resolve_damage()**: That's correct since buffs don't deal damage.

       ...
   
   if ok:
       _emit_event(...)
   
   if trace:
       trace.record(...)

   This looks fine. `trace` is in scope throughout the function.

4. **Projectile hits: _emit_hit_event passes tags but ON_CAST doesn't**: Looking at `_emit_event`:
   ```gdscript
   func _emit_event(type: CombatEvent.Type, source: Node2D, target: Node2D = null, skill: SkillData = null, extra_data: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
       CombatExecutor.report_cast(source, target, skill)
   ```
   
   The `extra_data` parameter is never used! And ON_CAST doesn't pass tags. That's a minor issue.

5. **FlameStorm.tscn has a `caster` field but the AoE execution does `instance.set_caster(ctx.caster)`**: Good, that works.

6. **Shadow step: `_find_shadow_step_target` looks for enemies in "enemy" group. Player is in "player" group. Enemy needs to be in "enemy" group.**

2. **Enemy group membership**: Need to verify enemy.gd has `add_to_group("enemy")` for shadow_step to work.

3. **FlameStorm AOE**: The `set_caster` method is called correctly, and `_on_body_entered` checks `body == caster`. But the `damage` is set via `if "damage" in instance: instance.damage = resolve_damage(...)`. Since `damage` is an @export var in FlameStorm, this should work.

extends CharacterBody2D
class_name Enemy

## 鈹€鈹€ 灞炴€?鈹€鈹€
@export var max_hp: int = 30
@export var move_speed: float = 120.0
@export var detect_range: float = 200.0
@export var attack_range: float = 55.0
@export var attack_damage: int = 8
@export var attack_cooldown: float = 1.0

## 鈹€鈹€ 鎺夎惤 鈹€鈹€
@export var drop_scene: PackedScene

## 鈹€鈹€ 瑙嗚棰勮 (0=鍝ㄥ叺馃煝, 1=澹叺馃敶, 2=鍧﹀厠馃煟) 鈹€鈹€
@export var enemy_type: int = 1:
	set(v):
		enemy_type = v
		_apply_preset(v)

const PRESETS: Array[Dictionary] = [
	{"name": "鍝ㄥ叺", "color": Color(0.3, 0.9, 0.3, 1), "scale": Vector2(0.25, 0.25)},
	{"name": "澹叺", "color": Color(0.8, 0.25, 0.25, 1), "scale": Vector2(0.4, 0.4)},
	{"name": "鍧﹀厠", "color": Color(0.6, 0.2, 0.7, 1), "scale": Vector2(0.55, 0.55)},
]

## 鈹€鈹€ 棰勮灞炴€ц〃锛堝摠鍏?澹叺/鍧﹀厠锛?鈹€鈹€
const PRESET_STATS: Array[Dictionary] = [
	{"strength": 5,  "intelligence": 5,  "agility": 15, "endurance": 5},   # 鍝ㄥ叺锛氶珮鏁忔嵎
	{"strength": 10, "intelligence": 8,  "agility": 10, "endurance": 10},  # 澹叺锛氬潎琛n	{"strength": 15, "intelligence": 5,  "agility": 5,  "endurance": 15},  # 鍧﹀厠锛氶珮鍔涜€怽n]

var enemy_color: Color = Color.RED
var enemy_scale: Vector2 = Vector2(0.4, 0.4)
var enemy_name: String = "鏁屼汉"

## 鈹€鈹€ 杩愯鏃?鈹€鈹€
var player: Player = null
var attack_ready: bool = true

signal died

@onready var health_component: HealthComponent = $HealthComponent
@onready var skill_manager: SkillManager = $SkillManager
@onready var stats_component: StatsComponent = $StatsComponent


func _ready() -> void:
	add_to_group("enemy")
	# 纰版挒褰㈢姸
	$CollisionShape2D.shape = load("res://entities/enemy/enemy_body_shape.tres")

	# 搴旂敤棰勮灞炴€n	_apply_preset_stats(enemy_type)

	# 鐢熷懡鍊肩粍浠禱n	health_component.setup($CollisionShape2D)
	health_component.regen_rate = 0.0
	health_component.died.connect(_on_died)
	_apply_stats_to_health()

	# 鎶€鑳斤紙绾暟鎹紝浼ゅ璁＄畻浜ょ粰 SkillExecutor锛塡n	var bolt_data := load("res://skills/data/shadow_bolt_data.tres") as SkillData
	if bolt_data:
		bolt_data.skill_type = SkillData.SkillType.PROJECTILE
		bolt_data.projectile_scene = load("res://skills/scenes/shadow_bolt.tscn")
		bolt_data.scene = bolt_data.projectile_scene  # 鍏煎
		bolt_data.projectile_speed = 250.0
		bolt_data.damage = 10
		bolt_data.damage_scaling = 0.6               # 60% 榄旀硶浼ゅ鍔犳垚
		skill_manager.pool = SkillPool.new()
		skill_manager.pool.add_skill(bolt_data)
		skill_manager.pool.build()
		skill_manager.equip_hand("right", bolt_data)

	# 瑙嗚
	_apply_preset(enemy_type)
	_apply_visuals()

	# 鐘舵€佹満
	_setup_state_machine()

	call_deferred("_find_player")


## 鈹€鈹€ 灞炴€?鈹€鈹€

func _apply_preset_stats(type_idx: int) -> void:
	if type_idx < 0 or type_idx >= PRESET_STATS.size():
		return
	var s = PRESET_STATS[type_idx]
	stats_component.strength = s["strength"]
	stats_component.intelligence = s["intelligence"]
	stats_component.agility = s["agility"]
	stats_component.endurance = s["endurance"]
	stats_component._recalculate_all()


func _apply_stats_to_health() -> void:
	health_component.max_hp = 20 + stats_component.max_hp_bonus
	health_component.hp = health_component.max_hp
	move_speed = 80 + stats_component.move_speed_bonus
	attack_damage = 3 + stats_component.physical_damage


## 鈹€鈹€ 瑙嗚 鈹€鈹€

func _apply_preset(type_idx: int) -> void:
	if type_idx < 0 or type_idx >= PRESETS.size():
		return
	var p = PRESETS[type_idx]
	enemy_name = p["name"]
	enemy_color = p["color"]
	enemy_scale = p["scale"]


func _apply_visuals() -> void:
	var spr = $Sprite2D
	spr.modulate = enemy_color
	spr.scale = enemy_scale


func _flash_damage() -> void:
	var spr = $Sprite2D
	spr.modulate = Color.WHITE
	await get_tree().create_timer(0.1).timeout
	spr.modulate = enemy_color


## 鈹€鈹€ 鐘舵€佹満 鈹€鈹€

func _setup_state_machine() -> void:
	var sm = $StateMachine
	if not sm.get_script():
		return
	for child in sm.get_children():
		if child.has_method("enter") and child.get("entity") != self:
			child.set("entity", self)


func _find_player() -> void:
	player = get_tree().get_first_node_in_group("player") as Player
	if not player:
		await get_tree().create_timer(0.5).timeout
		_find_player()


## 鈹€鈹€ AI 杈呭姪 鈹€鈹€

func get_player_direction() -> Vector2:
	if not player:
		return Vector2.ZERO
	return (player.global_position - global_position).normalized()


func distance_to_player() -> float:
	if not player:
		return INF
	return global_position.distance_to(player.global_position)


## 鈹€鈹€ 鍙椾激/姝讳骸 鈹€鈹€

func take_damage(amount: int) -> void:
	_flash_damage()
	health_component.take_damage(amount)


func _on_died() -> void:
	# 鍑绘潃濂栧姳缁忛獙
	if player and player.stats_component:
		player.stats_component.add_experience(30 + stats_component.level * 10)
	_spawn_drop()
	died.emit()
	queue_free()


func _spawn_drop() -> void:
	if not drop_scene:
		if randf() < 0.5:
			drop_scene = load("res://pickups/health_pickup.tscn")
		else:
			drop_scene = load("res://pickups/mana_pickup.tscn")

	if not drop_scene:
		return
	var drop = drop_scene.instantiate()
	get_tree().current_scene.add_child.call_deferred(drop)
	drop.global_position = global_position


## 鈹€鈹€ 鏀诲嚮 鈹€鈹€

func perform_attack() -> void:
	if not attack_ready or not player:
		return
	attack_ready = false
	player.take_damage(attack_damage)
	await get_tree().create_timer(attack_cooldown).timeout
	attack_ready = true

### Issue 1: FlameStorm doesn't pass skill data to report_hit
The ON_HIT event for FlameStorm doesn't include skill data or tags, so the EffectGraph demo (fire skill 鈫?boss branch) won't trigger for flame storm hits.

func _ready() -> void:
	# 瀛愮被瑙嗚瀹氬埗锛堝繀椤诲湪褰㈢姸鍒涘缓涔嬪墠锛屽厑璁歌鍐?collision_radius锛塡n	_apply_visual()

func _on_area_entered(area: Area2D) -> void:
	if _has_hit:

## 寮€濮嬩竴娆℃柊鐨勮拷韪猏nstatic func begin(chain_name: String = "", skill_name: String = "") -> CombatTrace:

## 鑾峰彇鏈€杩戜竴娆¤拷韪猏nstatic func get_last() -> CombatTrace:
	if traces.is_empty():
		return null
	return traces.back()


## 鎸夋妧鑳藉悕鏌ヨ
static func find_by_skill(name_fragment: String) -> Array[CombatTrace]:
	var result: Array[CombatTrace] = []

	return result


## 鏌ヨ鎵€鏈夊寘鍚壒瀹?modifier 鐨勮拷韪猏nstatic func find_using_modifier(mod_name: String) -> Array[CombatTrace]:

static func summarize(trace: CombatTrace) -> String:
	if not trace:
		return "(null)"
	var lines: Array[String] = []
	lines.append("鈺愨晲鈺?CombatTrace: %s 鈺愨晲鈺怽" % trace.chain_id)
	lines.append("  Skill: %s | Events: %d | Damage: %d" % [trace.skill_name, trace.events.size(), trace.final_damage])
	lines.append("  Damage Chain: %s" % trace.get_damage_chain())

	var i := 1

		match ev.category:
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.FIREWALL_BLOCK:

				lines.append("%s 馃攳 %s: %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, "鉁匼" if r else "鉂孿"])

		i += 1

	return "\n".join(lines)

extends RefCounted
## 鎴樻枟璋冭瘯鍣?鈥?鍏ㄥ眬杩借釜瀛樺偍 + 鏌ヨ + 鍥炴斁

## 鑾峰彇褰撳墠娲昏穬杩借釜锛圫killExecutor/CombatExecutor 鐢ㄥ畠鏉ヨ褰曪級

	if not enabled or not trace:
		return

## 灏嗚拷韪憳瑕佹墦鍗板埌 Godot 鎺у埗鍙癨nstatic func print_console(trace: CombatTrace) -> void:
	print("\n" + "鈹乗" * 52)
	print("鈿旓笍  CombatTrace  #%d | %s" % [traces.size(), trace.chain_id])
	print("   鎶€鑳? %s | 浜嬩欢鏁? %d | 鏈€缁堜激瀹? %d" % [trace.skill_name, trace.events.size(), trace.final_damage])
	print("   浼ゅ閾? %s" % trace.get_damage_chain())

	var i := 1
	for ev in trace.events:
		var prefix := "   %2d." % i
		match ev.category:
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.FIREWALL_BLOCK:
				print("%s 馃毇 BLOCKED | %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY:

				var sign := "+" if delta >= 0 else ""
				print("%s 馃搳 %s: %d 鈫?%d (%s%d)" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.input_data.get("damage", 0), ev.output_data.get("damage", 0), sign, delta])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.CONDITION_CHECK:
				var r: bool = ev.output_data.get("result", false)
				print("%s 馃攳 %s: %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, "PASS 鉁匼" if r else "FAIL 鉂孿"])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.EVENT_EMIT:
				var data_str := ""
				for k in ev.output_data:
					if not data_str.is_empty(): data_str += ", "
					data_str += "%s=%s" % [k, ev.output_data[k]]
				if not data_str.is_empty(): data_str = "  [%s]" % data_str
				print("%s 馃摗 %s 鈫?%s%s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.target, data_str])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.DAMAGE_RESOLVE:
				print("%s 馃挜 %s | base=%d" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.input_data.get("base_damage", 0)])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.SKILL_EXECUTE:
				var ok: bool = ev.output_data.get("success", false)
				print("%s 鈿?%s | success=%s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, "OK 鉁匼" if ok else "FAIL 鉂孿"])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.PHASE_ENTER:
				print("%s 鈻? %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
			_:
				print("%s  路 %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
		i += 1

	print("鈹乗" * 52 + "\n")

## 寮€濮嬩竴娆℃柊鐨勮拷韪猏nstatic func begin(chain_name: String = "", skill_name: String = "") -> CombatTrace:
	if not enabled:
		return null
	_active_trace = CombatTrace.new(chain_name)
	_active_trace.skill_name = skill_name
	return _active_trace


## 鑾峰彇褰撳墠娲昏穬杩借釜锛圫killExecutor/CombatExecutor 鐢ㄥ畠鏉ヨ褰曪級
static func active() -> CombatTrace:
	return _active_trace if enabled else null


## 瀛樺偍涓€娆″畬鏁磋拷韪猏nstatic func store(trace: CombatTrace) -> void:
	if not enabled or not trace:
		return
	traces.append(trace)
	if traces.size() > MAX_TRACES:
		traces.pop_front()
	_active_trace = null

	# 鍚屾杈撳嚭鍒版帶鍒跺彴
	print_console(trace)

	print("\n" + "鈹乗" * 52)
	print("鈿旓笍  CombatTrace  #%d | %s" % [traces.size(), trace.chain_id])
	print("   鎶€鑳? %s | 浜嬩欢鏁? %d | 鏈€缁堜激瀹? %d" % [trace.skill_name, trace.events.size(), trace.final_damage])
	print("   浼ゅ閾? %s" % trace.get_damage_chain())

	var i := 1
	for ev in trace.events:
		var prefix := "   %2d." % i
		match ev.category:
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.FIREWALL_BLOCK:
				print("%s 馃毇 BLOCKED | %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY:
				var delta: int = ev.metadata.get("delta", 0)
				var sign := "+" if delta >= 0 else ""
				print("%s 馃搳 %s: %d 鈫?%d (%s%d)" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.input_data.get("damage", 0), ev.output_data.get("damage", 0), sign, delta])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.CONDITION_CHECK:
				var r: bool = ev.output_data.get("result", false)
				print("%s 馃攳 %s: %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, "PASS 鉁匼" if r else "FAIL 鉂孿"])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.EVENT_EMIT:

				if not data_str.is_empty(): data_str = "  [%s]" % data_str
				print("%s 馃摗 %s 鈫?%s%s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.target, data_str])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.DAMAGE_RESOLVE:
				print("%s 馃挜 %s | base=%d" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.input_data.get("base_damage", 0)])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.SKILL_EXECUTE:
				var ok: bool = ev.output_data.get("success", false)
				print("%s 鈿?%s | success=%s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, "OK 鉁匼" if ok else "FAIL 鉂孿"])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.PHASE_ENTER:

static func find_by_skill(name_fragment: String) -> Array[CombatTrace]:
	var result: Array[CombatTrace] = []
	for t in traces:
		if name_fragment.to_lower() in t.skill_name.to_lower():
			result.append(t)
	return result


## 鏌ヨ鎵€鏈夊寘鍚壒瀹?modifier 鐨勮拷韪猏nstatic func find_using_modifier(mod_name: String) -> Array[CombatTrace]:
	var result: Array[CombatTrace] = []

static func summarize(trace: CombatTrace) -> String:
	if not trace:
		return "(null)"
	var lines: Array[String] = []
	lines.append("鈺愨晲鈺?CombatTrace: %s 鈺愨晲鈺怽" % trace.chain_id)
	lines.append("  Skill: %s | Events: %d | Damage: %d" % [trace.skill_name, trace.events.size(), trace.final_damage])
	lines.append("  Damage Chain: %s" % trace.get_damage_chain())

	var i := 1
	for ev in trace.events:
		var prefix := "  %2d." % i
		match ev.category:
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.FIREWALL_BLOCK:
				lines.append("%s 馃毇 %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY:
				var delta: int = ev.metadata.get("delta", 0)
				lines.append("%s 馃搳 %s: %d 鈫?%d (%+d)" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.input_data.get("damage", 0), ev.output_data.get("damage", 0), delta])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.CONDITION_CHECK:
				var r: bool = ev.output_data.get("result", false)
				lines.append("%s 馃攳 %s: %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, "鉁匼" if r else "鉂孿"])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.EVENT_EMIT:

class_name CombatDebugger
extends RefCounted
## 鎴樻枟璋冭瘯鍣?鈥?鍏ㄥ眬杩借釜瀛樺偍 + 鏌ヨ + 鍥炴斁
## 
## 鐢ㄦ硶锛歕n##   CombatDebugger.enabled = true          # 寮€鍚拷韪猏n##   ... 鎴樻枟鍙戠敓 ...
##   var last := CombatDebugger.get_last()  # 鑾峰彇鏈€杩戣拷韪猏n##   print(last.get_damage_chain())         # 鏌ョ湅浼ゅ閾綷n##   CombatDebugger.clear()                 # 娓呯┖

## 鈹€鈹€ 鍏ㄥ眬寮€鍏?鈹€鈹€
static var enabled: bool = false

## 鈹€鈹€ 瀛樺偍 鈹€鈹€
static var traces: Array[CombatTrace] = []
static var _active_trace: CombatTrace = null

## 鏈€澶у瓨鍌ㄦ暟閲廫nconst MAX_TRACES: int = 50


## 寮€濮嬩竴娆℃柊鐨勮拷韪猏nstatic func begin(chain_name: String = "", skill_name: String = "") -> CombatTrace:
	if not enabled:
		return null
	_active_trace = CombatTrace.new(chain_name)
	_active_trace.skill_name = skill_name
	return _active_trace


## 鑾峰彇褰撳墠娲昏穬杩借釜锛圫killExecutor/CombatExecutor 鐢ㄥ畠鏉ヨ褰曪級
static func active() -> CombatTrace:
	return _active_trace if enabled else null


## 瀛樺偍涓€娆″畬鏁磋拷韪猏nstatic func store(trace: CombatTrace) -> void:
	if not enabled or not trace:
		return
	traces.append(trace)
	if traces.size() > MAX_TRACES:
		traces.pop_front()
	_active_trace = null

	# 鍚屾杈撳嚭鍒版帶鍒跺彴
	print_console(trace)

## 灏嗚拷韪憳瑕佹墦鍗板埌 Godot 鎺у埗鍙癨nstatic func print_console(trace: CombatTrace) -> void:
	print("\n" + CONSOLE_SEP)
	print("鈿旓笍  CombatTrace  #%d | %s" % [traces.size(), trace.chain_id])
	print("   鎶€鑳? %s | 浜嬩欢鏁? %d | 鏈€缁堜激瀹? %d" % [trace.skill_name, trace.events.size(), trace.final_damage])
	print("   浼ゅ閾? %s" % trace.get_damage_chain())

	var i := 1
	for ev in trace.events:
		var prefix := "   %2d." % i
		match ev.category:
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.FIREWALL_BLOCK:
				print("%s 馃毇 BLOCKED | %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY:
				var delta: int = ev.metadata.get("delta", 0)
				var sign := "+" if delta >= 0 else ""
				print("%s 馃搳 %s: %d 鈫?%d (%s%d)" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.input_data.get("damage", 0), ev.output_data.get("damage", 0), sign, delta])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.CONDITION_CHECK:
				var r: bool = ev.output_data.get("result", false)
				print("%s 馃攳 %s: %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, "PASS 鉁匼" if r else "FAIL 鉂孿"])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.EVENT_EMIT:
				var data_str := ""
				for k in ev.output_data:
					if not data_str.is_empty(): data_str += ", "
					data_str += "%s=%s" % [k, ev.output_data[k]]
				if not data_str.is_empty(): data_str = "  [%s]" % data_str
				print("%s 馃摗 %s 鈫?%s%s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.target, data_str])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.DAMAGE_RESOLVE:
				print("%s 馃挜 %s | base=%d" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.input_data.get("base_damage", 0)])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.SKILL_EXECUTE:
				var ok: bool = ev.output_data.get("success", false)
				print("%s 鈿?%s | success=%s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, "OK 鉁匼" if ok else "FAIL 鉂孿"])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.PHASE_ENTER:
				print("%s 鈻? %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
			_:
				print("%s  路 %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
		i += 1

	print(CONSOLE_SEP + "\n")


## 鑾峰彇鏈€杩戜竴娆¤拷韪猏nstatic func get_last() -> CombatTrace:
	if traces.is_empty():
		return null
	return traces.back()


## 鎸夋妧鑳藉悕鏌ヨ
static func find_by_skill(name_fragment: String) -> Array[CombatTrace]:
	var result: Array[CombatTrace] = []
	for t in traces:
		if name_fragment.to_lower() in t.skill_name.to_lower():
			result.append(t)
	return result


## 鏌ヨ鎵€鏈夊寘鍚壒瀹?modifier 鐨勮拷韪猏nstatic func find_using_modifier(mod_name: String) -> Array[CombatTrace]:
	var result: Array[CombatTrace] = []
	for t in traces:
		for ev in t.events:
			if ev.category == CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY and mod_name in ev.source:
				result.append(t)
				break
	return result


## 鈹€鈹€ 鍥炴斁 鈹€鈹€

## 閫愭鍥炴斁锛氳繑鍥炴煇涓€姝ョ殑浜嬩欢锛?-based锛塡nstatic func replay_step(trace: CombatTrace, step: int) -> CombatTraceEvent:
	if not trace or step < 1 or step > trace.events.size():
		return null
	return trace.events[step - 1]


## 鑾峰彇杩借釜鎽樿
static func summarize(trace: CombatTrace) -> String:
	if not trace:
		return "(null)"
	var lines: Array[String] = []
	lines.append("鈺愨晲鈺?CombatTrace: %s 鈺愨晲鈺怽" % trace.chain_id)
	lines.append("  Skill: %s | Events: %d | Damage: %d" % [trace.skill_name, trace.events.size(), trace.final_damage])
	lines.append("  Damage Chain: %s" % trace.get_damage_chain())

	var i := 1

		var prefix := "  %2d." % i
		match ev.category:

			CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY:
				var delta: int = ev.metadata.get("delta", 0)
				lines.append("%s 馃搳 %s: %d 鈫?%d (%+d)" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.input_data.get("damage", 0), ev.output_data.get("damage", 0), delta])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.CONDITION_CHECK:
				var r: bool = ev.output_data.get("result", false)
				lines.append("%s 馃攳 %s: %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, "鉁匼" if r else "鉂孿"])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.EVENT_EMIT:
				lines.append("%s 馃摗 %s 鈫?%s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.target])
			_:
				lines.append("%s 路 %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
		i += 1

	return "\n".join(lines)


## 娓呯┖鎵€鏈夎拷韪猏nstatic func clear() -> void:
	traces.clear()
	_active_trace = null


## 鑾峰彇杩借釜鏁伴噺
static func count() -> int:
	return traces.size()

## 寮€濮嬩竴娆℃柊鐨勮拷韪猏nstatic func begin(chain_name: String = "", skill_name: String = "") -> CombatTrace:

	return _active_trace


## 鑾峰彇褰撳墠娲昏穬杩借釜锛圫killExecutor/CombatExecutor 鐢ㄥ畠鏉ヨ褰曪級
static func active() -> CombatTrace:

	print("\n" + CONSOLE_SEP)
	print("鈿旓笍  CombatTrace  #%d | %s" % [traces.size(), trace.chain_id])
	print("   鎶€鑳? %s | 浜嬩欢鏁? %d | 鏈€缁堜激瀹? %d" % [trace.skill_name, trace.events.size(), trace.final_damage])
	print("   浼ゅ閾? %s" % trace.get_damage_chain())

	var i := 1
	for ev in trace.events:
		var prefix := "   %2d." % i
		match ev.category:
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.FIREWALL_BLOCK:
				print("%s 馃毇 BLOCKED | %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY:
				var delta: int = ev.metadata.get("delta", 0)
				var sign := "+" if delta >= 0 else ""
				print("%s 馃搳 %s: %d 鈫?%d (%s%d)" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.input_data.get("damage", 0), ev.output_data.get("damage", 0), sign, delta])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.CONDITION_CHECK:
				var r: bool = ev.output_data.get("result", false)
				print("%s 馃攳 %s: %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, "PASS 鉁匼" if r else "FAIL 鉂孿"])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.EVENT_EMIT:
				var data_str := ""
				for k in ev.output_data:
					if not data_str.is_empty(): data_str += ", "

				if not data_str.is_empty(): data_str = "  [%s]" % data_str

			CombatTraceEvent.Category.SKILL_EXECUTE:

				print("%s 鈿?%s | success=%s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, "OK 鉁匼" if ok else "FAIL 鉂孿"])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.PHASE_ENTER:
				print("%s 鈻? %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
			_:
				print("%s  路 %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
		i += 1

	print(CONSOLE_SEP + "\n")

static func find_by_skill(name_fragment: String) -> Array[CombatTrace]:
	var result: Array[CombatTrace] = []

class_name CombatDebugger
extends RefCounted
## 鎴樻枟璋冭瘯鍣?鈥?鍏ㄥ眬杩借釜瀛樺偍 + 鏌ヨ + 鍥炴斁
## 
## 鐢ㄦ硶锛歕n##   CombatDebugger.enabled = true          # 寮€鍚拷韪猏n##   ... 鎴樻枟鍙戠敓 ...
##   var last := CombatDebugger.get_last()  # 鑾峰彇鏈€杩戣拷韪猏n##   print(last.get_damage_chain())         # 鏌ョ湅浼ゅ閾綷n##   CombatDebugger.clear()                 # 娓呯┖

## 鈹€鈹€ 鍏ㄥ眬寮€鍏?鈹€鈹€
static var enabled: bool = false

## 鈹€鈹€ 瀛樺偍 鈹€鈹€
static var traces: Array[CombatTrace] = []
static var _active_trace: CombatTrace = null

## 鏈€澶у瓨鍌ㄦ暟閲廫nconst MAX_TRACES: int = 50


## 寮€濮嬩竴娆℃柊鐨勮拷韪猏nstatic func begin(chain_name: String = "", skill_name: String = "") -> CombatTrace:
	if not enabled:
		return null
	_active_trace = CombatTrace.new(chain_name)
	_active_trace.skill_name = skill_name
	return _active_trace


## 鑾峰彇褰撳墠娲昏穬杩借釜锛圫killExecutor/CombatExecutor 鐢ㄥ畠鏉ヨ褰曪級
static func active() -> CombatTrace:
	return _active_trace if enabled else null


## 瀛樺偍涓€娆″畬鏁磋拷韪猏nstatic func store(trace: CombatTrace) -> void:
	if not enabled or not trace:
		return
	traces.append(trace)
	if traces.size() > MAX_TRACES:
		traces.pop_front()
	_active_trace = null

	# 鍚屾杈撳嚭鍒版帶鍒跺彴
	print_console(trace)


## 鈹€鈹€ 鎺у埗鍙拌緭鍑?鈹€鈹€

const _SEP := "鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣"

## 灏嗚拷韪憳瑕佹墦鍗板埌 Godot 鎺у埗鍙癨nstatic func print_console(trace: CombatTrace) -> void:
	print("\n" + _SEP)
	print("鈿旓笍  CombatTrace  #%d | %s" % [traces.size(), trace.chain_id])
	print("   鎶€鑳? %s | 浜嬩欢鏁? %d | 鏈€缁堜激瀹? %d" % [trace.skill_name, trace.events.size(), trace.final_damage])
	print("   浼ゅ閾? %s" % trace.get_damage_chain())

	var i := 1
	for ev in trace.events:
		var prefix := "   %2d." % i
		match ev.category:
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.FIREWALL_BLOCK:
				print("%s 馃毇 BLOCKED | %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY:
				var delta: int = ev.metadata.get("delta", 0)
				var sign := "+" if delta >= 0 else ""
				print("%s 馃搳 %s: %d 鈫?%d (%s%d)" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.input_data.get("damage", 0), ev.output_data.get("damage", 0), sign, delta])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.CONDITION_CHECK:
				var r: bool = ev.output_data.get("result", false)
				print("%s 馃攳 %s: %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, "PASS 鉁匼" if r else "FAIL 鉂孿"])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.EVENT_EMIT:
				var data_str := ""
				for k in ev.output_data:
					if not data_str.is_empty(): data_str += ", "
					data_str += "%s=%s" % [k, ev.output_data[k]]
				if not data_str.is_empty(): data_str = "  [%s]" % data_str
				print("%s 馃摗 %s 鈫?%s%s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.target, data_str])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.DAMAGE_RESOLVE:
				print("%s 馃挜 %s | base=%d" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.input_data.get("base_damage", 0)])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.SKILL_EXECUTE:
				var ok: bool = ev.output_data.get("success", false)
				print("%s 鈿?%s | success=%s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, "OK 鉁匼" if ok else "FAIL 鉂孿"])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.PHASE_ENTER:
				print("%s 鈻? %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
			_:
				print("%s  路 %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
		i += 1

	print(_SEP + "\n")


## 鑾峰彇鏈€杩戜竴娆¤拷韪猏nstatic func get_last() -> CombatTrace:
	if traces.is_empty():
		return null
	return traces.back()


## 鎸夋妧鑳藉悕鏌ヨ
static func find_by_skill(name_fragment: String) -> Array[CombatTrace]:
	var result: Array[CombatTrace] = []
	for t in traces:
		if name_fragment.to_lower() in t.skill_name.to_lower():
			result.append(t)
	return result


## 鏌ヨ鎵€鏈夊寘鍚壒瀹?modifier 鐨勮拷韪猏nstatic func find_using_modifier(mod_name: String) -> Array[CombatTrace]:
	var result: Array[CombatTrace] = []
	for t in traces:
		for ev in t.events:
			if ev.category == CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY and mod_name in ev.source:
				result.append(t)
				break
	return result

## 閫愭鍥炴斁锛氳繑鍥炴煇涓€姝ョ殑浜嬩欢锛?-based锛塡nstatic func replay_step(trace: CombatTrace, step: int) -> CombatTraceEvent:
	if not trace or step < 1 or step > trace.events.size():
		return null
	return trace.events[step - 1]


## 鑾峰彇杩借釜鎽樿
static func summarize(trace: CombatTrace) -> String:
	if not trace:
		return "(null)"
	var lines: Array[String] = []
	lines.append("鈺愨晲鈺?CombatTrace: %s 鈺愨晲鈺怽" % trace.chain_id)
	lines.append("  Skill: %s | Events: %d | Damage: %d" % [trace.skill_name, trace.events.size(), trace.final_damage])
	lines.append("  Damage Chain: %s" % trace.get_damage_chain())

	var i := 1
	for ev in trace.events:
		var prefix := "  %2d." % i
		match ev.category:
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.FIREWALL_BLOCK:
				lines.append("%s 馃毇 %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY:
				var delta: int = ev.metadata.get("delta", 0)
				lines.append("%s 馃搳 %s: %d 鈫?%d (%+d)" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.input_data.get("damage", 0), ev.output_data.get("damage", 0), delta])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.CONDITION_CHECK:
				var r: bool = ev.output_data.get("result", false)
				lines.append("%s 馃攳 %s: %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, "鉁匼" if r else "鉂孿"])
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.EVENT_EMIT:
				lines.append("%s 馃摗 %s 鈫?%s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.target])
			_:
				lines.append("%s 路 %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
		i += 1

	return "\n".join(lines)


## 娓呯┖鎵€鏈夎拷韪猏nstatic func clear() -> void:
	traces.clear()
	_active_trace = null


## 鑾峰彇杩借釜鏁伴噺
static func count() -> int:
	return traces.size()

class_name CombatTrace
extends RefCounted
## 鎴樻枟杩借釜閾?鈥?涓€娆″畬鏁存垬鏂楅摼鐨勬墍鏈変簨浠禱n## 
## 鐢熷懡鍛ㄦ湡锛歕n##   trace = CombatTrace.new("fireball_cast")
##   trace.record_phase_enter(...)
##   trace.record_modifier(...)
##   trace.record_event(...)
##   CombatDebugger.store(trace)

## 閾炬爣璇哱nvar chain_id: String = ""
var skill_name: String = ""
var started_at_ms: int = 0

## 浜嬩欢鍒楄〃
var events: Array[CombatTraceEvent] = []

## 鎬讳激瀹筹紙蹇€熸煡璇級
var final_damage: int = 0


func _init(chain_name: String = "") -> void:
	chain_id = chain_name
	started_at_ms = Time.get_ticks_msec()


## 鈹€鈹€ 璁板綍蹇嵎鏂规硶 鈹€鈹€

func record(cat: CombatTraceEvent.Category, phase: CombatPhase.Phase, name_str: String, src: String = "", tgt: String = "", input: Dictionary = {}, output: Dictionary = {}, meta: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
	var ev := CombatTraceEvent.create(cat, phase, name_str)
	ev.source = src
	ev.target = tgt
	ev.input_data = input
	ev.output_data = output
	ev.metadata = meta
	ev.depth = CombatEventBus._emit_depth
	events.append(ev)


func record_modifier(mod_name: String, stage_name: String, before: int, after: int, tags: Array = []) -> void:
	record(
		CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY,
		CombatPhase.Phase.MODIFIER,
		"%s @ %s" % [mod_name, stage_name],
		mod_name, "",
		{"damage": before},
		{"damage": after},
		{"tags": tags, "delta": after - before}
	)


func record_condition(cond_name: String, result: bool, why: String = "") -> void:
	record(
		CombatTraceEvent.Category.CONDITION_CHECK,
		CombatPhase.Phase.CONDITION,
		cond_name,
		cond_name, "",
		{},
		{"result": result},
		{"why": why}
	)


func record_event(ev_type: String, src: String, tgt: String, data: Dictionary) -> void:
	record(
		CombatTraceEvent.Category.EVENT_EMIT,
		CombatPhase.Phase.EVENT,
		ev_type, src, tgt,
		{}, data
	)


func record_firewall(reason: String) -> void:
	record(
		CombatTraceEvent.Category.FIREWALL_BLOCK,
		CombatPhase.Phase.EVENT,
		"BLOCKED: " + reason,
		"CombatExecutor", "", {}, {}
	)


## 鈹€鈹€ 鏌ヨ 鈹€鈹€

func find_by_category(cat: CombatTraceEvent.Category) -> Array[CombatTraceEvent]:
	var result: Array[CombatTraceEvent] = []
	for ev in events:
		if ev.category == cat:
			result.append(ev)
	return result


func get_damage_chain() -> String:
	var parts: Array[String] = []
	for ev in find_by_category(CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY):
		var delta: int = ev.metadata.get("delta", 0)
		var sign := "+" if delta >= 0 else ""
		parts.append("%s(%s%d)" % [ev.source, sign, delta])
	return " 鈫?".join(parts) if not parts.is_empty() else "(no modifiers)"

class_name Projectile
extends Area2D
## 鎶曞皠鐗╁熀绫?鈥?鎵€鏈夐琛屾妧鑳斤紙鐏悆銆佹殫褰卞脊銆佸啺绠瓑锛夌户鎵挎绫籠n## 瀛愮被瑕嗗啓 _apply_visual() 璁剧疆澶栬锛屾垨瑕嗗啓 @export 榛樿鍊糪n
@export var speed: float = 300.0
@export var damage: int = 10
@export var lifetime: float = 3.0
@export var collision_radius: float = 8.0

var direction: Vector2 = Vector2.DOWN
var caster: Node2D = null
var _has_hit: bool = false


func _ready() -> void:
	# 瀛愮被瑙嗚瀹氬埗锛堝繀椤诲湪褰㈢姸鍒涘缓涔嬪墠锛屽厑璁歌鍐?collision_radius锛塡n	_apply_visual()

	# 纭繚纰版挒褰㈢姸
	var shape_node = $CollisionShape2D
	if shape_node and shape_node.shape == null:
		var circle = CircleShape2D.new()
		circle.radius = collision_radius
		shape_node.shape = circle

	# 杩炴帴淇″彿
	body_entered.connect(_on_body_entered)
	area_entered.connect(_on_area_entered)
	add_to_group("projectile")

	# 鑷姩閿€姣乗n	await get_tree().create_timer(lifetime).timeout
	queue_free()


## 瀛愮被瑕嗗啓锛氳缃?modulate / 绮掑瓙 / 缂╂斁绛夎瑙夊睘鎬nfunc _apply_visual() -> void:
	pass


func set_direction(dir: Vector2) -> void:
	direction = dir.normalized()
	rotation = direction.angle()


func _physics_process(delta: float) -> void:
	global_position += direction * speed * delta


func set_caster(c: Node2D) -> void:
	caster = c


func _on_body_entered(body: Node2D) -> void:
	if _has_hit:
		return
	if body == caster:
		return
	if not is_instance_valid(caster) or not is_instance_valid(body):
		return
	if body.has_method("take_damage"):
		_has_hit = true
		_emit_hit_event(body)
		body.take_damage(damage)
	queue_free()


func _on_area_entered(area: Area2D) -> void:
	if _has_hit:
		return
	if area.owner == caster:
		return
	if area.is_in_group("projectile"):
		return
	if not is_instance_valid(caster) or not is_instance_valid(area):
		return
	if area.has_method("take_damage"):
		_has_hit = true
		_emit_hit_event(area)
		area.take_damage(damage)
	queue_free()


## 鍙戝皠 ON_HIT 鈫?CombatExecutor锛堝敮涓€鏉冨▉鍏ュ彛锛塡nfunc _emit_hit_event(target: Node2D) -> void:
	var skill := get_meta("skill_data", null) as SkillData
	var tags: Array[String] = skill.tags if skill else []
	CombatExecutor.report_hit(caster, target, damage, global_position, skill, tags)

	# 杩藉姞 ON_HIT 鍒?trace 骞跺叧闂璡n	var trace := get_meta("_combat_trace", null) as CombatTrace
	if trace:
		trace.record(
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.EVENT_EMIT,
			CombatPhase.Phase.EVENT,
			"ON_HIT", caster.name if caster else "?", target.name,
			{"damage": damage},
			{"damage": damage, "target": target.name}
		)
		trace.final_damage = damage
		CombatDebugger.store(trace)
		remove_meta("_combat_trace")

class_name SkillExecutor
extends Node
## 鏍稿績鎵ц鍣?鈥?璋冨害鍣?+ 鍒嗛樁娈?Modifier Pipeline
## 
## 鑱岃矗锛歕n##   1. 鎸佹湁鍒嗛樁娈?modifier 绠＄嚎锛團LAT 鈫?MULTIPLY 鈫?OVERRIDE 鈫?FINAL锛塡n##   2. execute() 缁熶竴鏂芥硶鍏ュ彛
##   3. resolve_damage() 鎸夐樁娈佃窇绠＄嚎 鈫?杩斿洖鏈€缁堜激瀹冲€糪n##   4. 鎸夋妧鑳界被鍨嬪垎鍙戝叿浣撴墽琛孿n##
## 闃舵淇濊瘉锛歕n##   鍚岄樁娈靛唴鎸?priority 鎺掑簭 鈫?娑堥櫎"璋佸悗鎵ц璋佽耽"鐨勯殣寮?bug
##   FLAT 姘歌繙鍦?MULTIPLY 涔嬪墠 鈫?鐏劙鎴掓寚+20% 涓€瀹氫綔鐢ㄥ湪鍩虹鍊间笂

## 鈹€鈹€ 鍒嗛樁娈?Modifier 绠＄嚎 鈹€鈹€
## key = DamageModifier.Stage (int), value = Array[DamageModifier] (宸叉寜 priority 鎺掑簭)
var modifiers_by_stage: Dictionary = {
	DamageModifier.Stage.FLAT: [],
	DamageModifier.Stage.MULTIPLY: [],
	DamageModifier.Stage.OVERRIDE: [],
	DamageModifier.Stage.FINAL: [],
}

## 鈹€鈹€ 鍏煎鏃т唬鐮佺殑骞抽摵瑙嗗浘锛堝彧璇伙級 鈹€鈹€
var modifiers: Array[DamageModifier]:
	get:
		var all: Array[DamageModifier] = []
		for stage in [DamageModifier.Stage.FLAT, DamageModifier.Stage.MULTIPLY, DamageModifier.Stage.OVERRIDE, DamageModifier.Stage.FINAL]:
			all.append_array(modifiers_by_stage[stage])
		return all


## 鈹€鈹€ 绠＄嚎鍏ュ彛锛氫激瀹宠В鏋愶紙鍒嗛樁娈碉級 鈹€鈹€
## 娴佺▼锛欴amageContext 鈫?FLAT 鈫?MULTIPLY 鈫?OVERRIDE 鈫?FINAL 鈫?return

func resolve_damage(skill: SkillData, ctx: CastContext) -> int:
	var dc := DamageContext.from_cast(skill, ctx)
	var trace := CombatDebugger.active()

	if trace:
		trace.record(
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.DAMAGE_RESOLVE,
			CombatPhase.Phase.MODIFIER,
			"resolve_damage: %s" % skill.display_name,
			skill.get_id(), "",
			{"base_damage": dc.base_damage},
			{},
			{"tags": skill.tags}
		)

	_apply_stage(dc, DamageModifier.Stage.FLAT, trace)
	_apply_stage(dc, DamageModifier.Stage.MULTIPLY, trace)
	_apply_stage(dc, DamageModifier.Stage.OVERRIDE, trace)
	_apply_stage(dc, DamageModifier.Stage.FINAL, trace)

	var result := maxi(1, dc.final_damage)

	if trace:
		trace.final_damage = result

	return result


## 鎵ц鍗曚釜闃舵鐨勬墍鏈?modifier锛堝甫 trace锛塡nfunc _apply_stage(ctx: DamageContext, stage: DamageModifier.Stage, trace: CombatTrace = null) -> void:
	var stage_names := ["FLAT", "MULTIPLY", "OVERRIDE", "FINAL"]
	for mod in modifiers_by_stage[stage]:
		if mod and mod.enabled:
			var before := ctx.final_damage
			mod.modify(ctx)
			var after := ctx.final_damage

			if trace and before != after:
				var mod_name: String = mod.get_script().get_global_name() if mod.get_script() else "UnknownModifier"
				trace.record_modifier(mod_name, stage_names[stage], before, after, ctx.tags)


## 鈹€鈹€ 缁熶竴鏂芥硶鍏ュ彛 鈹€鈹€

func execute(skill: SkillData, context: CastContext) -> bool:
	if not skill or not context or not context.caster:
		return false

	# 閲嶇疆閾惧紡璁℃暟锛堟瘡娆℃柊鎶€鑳芥柦鏀惧紑濮嬫柊閾撅級
	if CombatExecutor.instance:
		CombatExecutor.instance.reset_chain()

	# 寮€濮嬭拷韪猏n	var trace := CombatDebugger.begin("cast_%s" % skill.get_id(), skill.display_name)
	if trace:
		trace.record(
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.PHASE_ENTER,
			CombatPhase.Phase.INPUT,
			"cast: %s" % skill.display_name,
			skill.get_id(), "",
			{"mp_cost": skill.mp_cost, "cooldown": skill.cooldown},
			{}
		)

	var ok := false
	var defer_store := false  ## 鎶曞皠鐗?AoE 寤惰繜 store锛屽湪鍛戒腑鏃剁敱瀹炰緥璐熻矗
	match skill.skill_type:
		SkillData.SkillType.PROJECTILE:
			ok = _execute_projectile(skill, context)
			defer_store = ok
		SkillData.SkillType.BUFF:
			ok = _execute_buff(skill, context)
		SkillData.SkillType.AOE:
			ok = _execute_aoe(skill, context)
			defer_store = ok
		SkillData.SkillType.DASH:
			ok = _execute_dash(skill, context)

	if ok:
		_emit_event(CombatEvent.Type.ON_CAST, context.caster, context.target, skill)

	# 瀛樺偍杩借釜
	if trace:
		trace.record(
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.SKILL_EXECUTE,
			CombatPhase.Phase.POST,
			"done: %s" % skill.display_name,
			skill.get_id(), "",
			{},
			{"success": ok, "final_damage": trace.final_damage}
		)
		if not defer_store:
			# Buff/Dash: 绔嬪嵆鍏抽棴 trace
			CombatDebugger.store(trace)
		# Projectile/AoE: trace 淇濇寔娲昏穬锛岀敱瀹炰緥鍦ㄥ懡涓?瓒呮椂鍚?store

	return ok


## 鍙戝皠鎴樻枟浜嬩欢 鈫?CombatExecutor锛堝敮涓€鏉冨▉鍏ュ彛锛塡nfunc _emit_event(type: CombatEvent.Type, source: Node2D, target: Node2D = null, skill: SkillData = null, extra_data: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
	var tags: Array[String] = skill.tags if skill else []
	CombatExecutor.report_cast(source, target, skill, {"tags": tags, "extra": extra_data})


## 鈹€鈹€ 鎶曞皠鐗?鈹€鈹€

func _execute_projectile(skill: SkillData, ctx: CastContext) -> bool:
	var scene := skill.projectile_scene if skill.projectile_scene else skill.scene
	if not scene:
		return false
	var instance := scene.instantiate() as Node2D
	ctx.world.add_child(instance)
	instance.global_position = ctx.caster.global_position + ctx.direction * skill.cast_distance
	if instance is Projectile:
		var proj := instance as Projectile
		proj.set_direction(ctx.direction)
		proj.set_caster(ctx.caster)
		proj.damage = resolve_damage(skill, ctx)
		proj.speed = skill.projectile_speed
		proj.set_meta("skill_data", skill)  ## 渚涗簨浠剁郴缁熻拷婧妧鑳絓n	return true


## 鈹€鈹€ Buff 鈹€鈹€

func _execute_buff(skill: SkillData, ctx: CastContext) -> bool:
	if not skill.buff_resource:
		return false
	var buff_manager := ctx.caster.get_node_or_null("BuffManager")
	if not buff_manager:
		return false
	var buff := skill.buff_resource.duplicate() as Buff
	if skill.buff_duration > 0:
		buff.duration = skill.buff_duration
	buff_manager.apply_buff(buff)
	return true


## 鈹€鈹€ AoE 鈹€鈹€

func _execute_aoe(skill: SkillData, ctx: CastContext) -> bool:
	if not skill.aoe_scene:
		return false
	var instance := skill.aoe_scene.instantiate() as Node2D
	ctx.world.add_child(instance)
	instance.global_position = ctx.caster.global_position + ctx.direction * skill.cast_distance
	if "damage" in instance:
		instance.damage = resolve_damage(skill, ctx)
	if instance.has_method("set_caster"):
		instance.set_caster(ctx.caster)
	instance.set_meta("skill_data", skill)  ## 渚涗簨浠剁郴缁熻拷婧妧鑳絓n	instance.set_meta("_combat_trace", CombatDebugger.active())  ## trace 璺熼殢 AoE
	return true


## 鈹€鈹€ 浣嶇Щ锛圖ash锛?鈹€鈹€

func _execute_dash(skill: SkillData, ctx: CastContext) -> bool:
	if not ctx.caster is CharacterBody2D:
		return false
	var body := ctx.caster as CharacterBody2D
	var target_pos := body.global_position + ctx.direction * skill.dash_distance

	if skill.buff_resource:
		target_pos = _find_shadow_step_target(body, ctx.direction, skill.dash_distance)

	var tween := body.create_tween()
	tween.tween_property(body, "global_position", target_pos,
		body.global_position.distance_to(target_pos) / skill.dash_speed
	).set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_QUAD)

	if skill.buff_resource:
		tween.tween_callback(_apply_dash_buff.bind(skill, ctx.caster))
	return true


func _find_shadow_step_target(body: CharacterBody2D, direction: Vector2, max_dist: float) -> Vector2:
	var best_target := Vector2.INF
	var best_dist := max_dist

	for enemy in body.get_tree().get_nodes_in_group("enemy"):
		var epos: Vector2 = enemy.global_position
		var to_enemy := epos - body.global_position
		var proj_dist := to_enemy.dot(direction)
		if proj_dist <= 0 or proj_dist > max_dist:
			continue
		var lateral := (to_enemy - direction * proj_dist).length()
		if lateral > 80:
			continue
		if proj_dist < best_dist:
			best_dist = proj_dist
			best_target = epos + direction * 40.0

	if best_target != Vector2.INF:
		return best_target
	return body.global_position + direction * max_dist


func _apply_dash_buff(skill: SkillData, caster: Node2D) -> void:
	var buff_manager := caster.get_node_or_null("BuffManager")
	if not buff_manager:
		return
	var buff := skill.buff_resource.duplicate() as Buff
	if skill.buff_duration > 0:
		buff.duration = skill.buff_duration
	buff_manager.apply_buff(buff)

func resolve_damage(skill: SkillData, ctx: CastContext) -> int:
	var dc := DamageContext.from_cast(skill, ctx)
	var trace := CombatDebugger.active()

	if trace:
		trace.record(
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.DAMAGE_RESOLVE,
			CombatPhase.Phase.MODIFIER,
			"resolve_damage: %s" % skill.display_name,
			skill.get_id(), "",
			{"base_damage": dc.base_damage},
			{},
			{"tags": skill.tags}
		)

	_apply_stage(dc, DamageModifier.Stage.FLAT, trace)
	_apply_stage(dc, DamageModifier.Stage.MULTIPLY, trace)
	_apply_stage(dc, DamageModifier.Stage.OVERRIDE, trace)
	_apply_stage(dc, DamageModifier.Stage.FINAL, trace)

	var result := maxi(1, dc.final_damage)

	if trace:
		trace.final_damage = result

	return result


## 鎵ц鍗曚釜闃舵鐨勬墍鏈?modifier锛堝甫 trace锛塡nfunc _apply_stage(ctx: DamageContext, stage: DamageModifier.Stage, trace: CombatTrace = null) -> void:
	var stage_names := ["FLAT", "MULTIPLY", "OVERRIDE", "FINAL"]
	for mod in modifiers_by_stage[stage]:
		if mod and mod.enabled:
			var before := ctx.final_damage
			mod.modify(ctx)
			var after := ctx.final_damage

			if trace and before != after:
				var mod_name: String = mod.get_script().get_global_name() if mod.get_script() else "UnknownModifier"
				trace.record_modifier(mod_name, stage_names[stage], before, after, ctx.tags)

func execute(skill: SkillData, context: CastContext) -> bool:
	if not skill or not context or not context.caster:
		return false

	# 閲嶇疆閾惧紡璁℃暟锛堟瘡娆℃柊鎶€鑳芥柦鏀惧紑濮嬫柊閾撅級
	if CombatExecutor.instance:
		CombatExecutor.instance.reset_chain()

	# 寮€濮嬭拷韪猏n	var trace := CombatDebugger.begin("cast_%s" % skill.get_id(), skill.display_name)
	if trace:
		trace.record(
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.PHASE_ENTER,
			CombatPhase.Phase.INPUT,
			"cast: %s" % skill.display_name,
			skill.get_id(), "",
			{"mp_cost": skill.mp_cost, "cooldown": skill.cooldown},
			{}
		)

	var ok := false
	var defer_store := false  ## 鎶曞皠鐗?AoE 寤惰繜 store锛屽湪鍛戒腑鏃剁敱瀹炰緥璐熻矗
	match skill.skill_type:
		SkillData.SkillType.PROJECTILE:
			ok = _execute_projectile(skill, context)
			defer_store = ok
		SkillData.SkillType.BUFF:
			ok = _execute_buff(skill, context)
		SkillData.SkillType.AOE:
			ok = _execute_aoe(skill, context)
			defer_store = ok
		SkillData.SkillType.DASH:
			ok = _execute_dash(skill, context)

	if ok:
		_emit_event(CombatEvent.Type.ON_CAST, context.caster, context.target, skill)

	# 瀛樺偍杩借釜
	if trace:
		trace.record(
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.SKILL_EXECUTE,
			CombatPhase.Phase.POST,
			"done: %s" % skill.display_name,
			skill.get_id(), "",
			{},
			{"success": ok, "final_damage": trace.final_damage}
		)
		if not defer_store:
			# Buff/Dash: 绔嬪嵆鍏抽棴 trace
			CombatDebugger.store(trace)
		# Projectile/AoE: trace 淇濇寔娲昏穬锛岀敱瀹炰緥鍦ㄥ懡涓?瓒呮椂鍚?store

	return ok

func _execute_projectile(skill: SkillData, ctx: CastContext) -> bool:
	var scene := skill.projectile_scene if skill.projectile_scene else skill.scene
	if not scene:
		return false
	var instance := scene.instantiate() as Node2D
	ctx.world.add_child(instance)
	instance.global_position = ctx.caster.global_position + ctx.direction * skill.cast_distance
	if instance is Projectile:
		var proj := instance as Projectile
		proj.set_direction(ctx.direction)
		proj.set_caster(ctx.caster)
		proj.damage = resolve_damage(skill, ctx)
		proj.speed = skill.projectile_speed
		proj.set_meta("skill_data", skill)  ## 渚涗簨浠剁郴缁熻拷婧妧鑳絓n		proj.set_meta("_combat_trace", CombatDebugger.active())  ## trace 璺熼殢鎶曞皠鐗‐n	return true


## 鈹€鈹€ Buff 鈹€鈹€

func _execute_buff(skill: SkillData, ctx: CastContext) -> bool:
	if not skill.buff_resource:
		return false
	var buff_manager := ctx.caster.get_node_or_null("BuffManager")
	if not buff_manager:
		return false
	var buff := skill.buff_resource.duplicate() as Buff
	if skill.buff_duration > 0:
		buff.duration = skill.buff_duration
	buff_manager.apply_buff(buff)
	return true


## 鈹€鈹€ AoE 鈹€鈹€

func _execute_aoe(skill: SkillData, ctx: CastContext) -> bool:
	if not skill.aoe_scene:
		return false
	var instance := skill.aoe_scene.instantiate() as Node2D
	ctx.world.add_child(instance)
	instance.global_position = ctx.caster.global_position + ctx.direction * skill.cast_distance
	if "damage" in instance:
		instance.damage = resolve_damage(skill, ctx)
	if instance.has_method("set_caster"):
		instance.set_caster(ctx.caster)
	instance.set_meta("skill_data", skill)  ## 渚涗簨浠剁郴缁熻拷婧妧鑳絓n	instance.set_meta("_combat_trace", CombatDebugger.active())  ## trace 璺熼殢 AoE
	return true

func _execute_dash(skill: SkillData, ctx: CastContext) -> bool:
	if not ctx.caster is CharacterBody2D:
		return false
	var body := ctx.caster as CharacterBody2D
	var target_pos := body.global_position + ctx.direction * skill.dash_distance

	if skill.buff_resource:
		target_pos = _find_shadow_step_target(body, ctx.direction, skill.dash_distance)

	var tween := body.create_tween()
	tween.tween_property(body, "global_position", target_pos,
		body.global_position.distance_to(target_pos) / skill.dash_speed
	).set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_QUAD)

	if skill.buff_resource:
		tween.tween_callback(_apply_dash_buff.bind(skill, ctx.caster))
	return true


func _find_shadow_step_target(body: CharacterBody2D, direction: Vector2, max_dist: float) -> Vector2:
	var best_target := Vector2.INF
	var best_dist := max_dist

	for enemy in body.get_tree().get_nodes_in_group("enemy"):
		var epos: Vector2 = enemy.global_position
		var to_enemy := epos - body.global_position
		var proj_dist := to_enemy.dot(direction)
		if proj_dist <= 0 or proj_dist > max_dist:
			continue
		var lateral := (to_enemy - direction * proj_dist).length()
		if lateral > 80:
			continue
		if proj_dist < best_dist:
			best_dist = proj_dist
			best_target = epos + direction * 40.0

	if best_target != Vector2.INF:
		return best_target
	return body.global_position + direction * max_dist


func _apply_dash_buff(skill: SkillData, caster: Node2D) -> void:
	var buff_manager := caster.get_node_or_null("BuffManager")
	if not buff_manager:
		return
	var buff := skill.buff_resource.duplicate() as Buff
	if skill.buff_duration > 0:
		buff.duration = skill.buff_duration
	buff_manager.apply_buff(buff)

The root cause was that `_execute_projectile` was missing the `set_meta("_combat_trace", ...)` line. Since `defer_store = ok` was true for projectiles, execute() skipped the store, but the projectile never received the trace reference, so it couldn't store either. The trace was silently orphaned.

Now it should work. The flow for a fireball is:
1. execute() 鈫?begin trace, record PHASE_ENTER
2. _execute_projectile 鈫?resolve_damage() records modifiers in trace, set_meta("_combat_trace", trace)

class_name FlameStorm
extends Area2D
## 鐑堢劙椋庢毚 鈥?AoE 鑼冨洿浼ゅ锛岀敓鎴愬悗绔嬪嵆浼ゅ鑼冨洿鍐呮墍鏈夋晫浜猴紝鐭殏寤惰繜鍚庤嚜姣乗n
@export var damage: int = 30

func _ready() -> void:
	# 纭繚纰版挒褰㈢姸
	var shape_node = $CollisionShape2D
	if shape_node and shape_node.shape == null:

		circle.radius = 80.0
		shape_node.shape = circle

	# 瑙嗚
	var spr = $Sprite2D
	if spr:
		spr.modulate = Color(1.0, 0.3, 0.1, 0.6)

	body_entered.connect(_on_body_entered)

	# 鐭殏寤惰繜鍚庤嚜姣乗n	await get_tree().create_timer(lifetime).timeout
	# 瓒呮椂鏃犲懡涓細鍏抽棴 trace

	if trace:

			CombatTraceEvent.Category.EVENT_EMIT,
			CombatPhase.Phase.POST,
			"EXPIRE (no hits)", name, "",
			{"lifetime": lifetime},
			{}
		)
		CombatDebugger.store(trace)
	queue_free()


func set_caster(c: Node2D) -> void:
	caster = c


func _on_body_entered(body: Node2D) -> void:
	if body == caster:
		return
	if body.has_method("take_damage"):
		_emit_hit_event(body)
		body.take_damage(damage)


func _emit_hit_event(target: Node2D) -> void:
	var skill := get_meta("skill_data", null) as SkillData
	var tags: Array[String] = skill.tags if skill else []
	CombatExecutor.report_hit(caster, target, damage, global_position, skill, tags)

			{"damage": damage, "target": target.name}
		)
		trace.final_damage = damage
		CombatDebugger.store(trace)
		remove_meta("_combat_trace")

class_name Projectile
extends Area2D
## 鎶曞皠鐗╁熀绫?鈥?鎵€鏈夐琛屾妧鑳斤紙鐏悆銆佹殫褰卞脊銆佸啺绠瓑锛夌户鎵挎绫籠n## 瀛愮被瑕嗗啓 _apply_visual() 璁剧疆澶栬锛屾垨瑕嗗啓 @export 榛樿鍊糪n
@export var speed: float = 300.0
@export var damage: int = 10
@export var lifetime: float = 3.0
@export var collision_radius: float = 8.0

var direction: Vector2 = Vector2.DOWN
var caster: Node2D = null
var _has_hit: bool = false


func _ready() -> void:
	# 瀛愮被瑙嗚瀹氬埗锛堝繀椤诲湪褰㈢姸鍒涘缓涔嬪墠锛屽厑璁歌鍐?collision_radius锛塡n	_apply_visual()

	# 纭繚纰版挒褰㈢姸
	var shape_node = $CollisionShape2D
	if shape_node and shape_node.shape == null:
		var circle = CircleShape2D.new()
		circle.radius = collision_radius
		shape_node.shape = circle

	# 杩炴帴淇″彿
	body_entered.connect(_on_body_entered)
	area_entered.connect(_on_area_entered)
	add_to_group("projectile")

	# 鑷姩閿€姣乗n	await get_tree().create_timer(lifetime).timeout
	# 瓒呮椂鏈懡涓細鍏抽棴 trace锛堣褰?MISS锛塡n	var trace := get_meta("_combat_trace", null) as CombatTrace
	if trace:
		trace.record(
			CombatTraceEvent.Category.EVENT_EMIT,
			CombatPhase.Phase.POST,
			"MISS (timeout)", name, "",
			{"lifetime": lifetime},
			{}
		)
		CombatDebugger.store(trace)
	queue_free()


## 瀛愮被瑕嗗啓锛氳缃?modulate / 绮掑瓙 / 缂╂斁绛夎瑙夊睘鎬nfunc _apply_visual() -> void:
	pass


func set_direction(dir: Vector2) -> void:
	direction = dir.normalized()
	rotation = direction.angle()


func _physics_process(delta: float) -> void:
	global_position += direction * speed * delta


func set_caster(c: Node2D) -> void:
	caster = c


func _on_body_entered(body: Node2D) -> void:
	if _has_hit:
		return
	if body == caster:
		return
	if not is_instance_valid(caster) or not is_instance_valid(body):
		return
	if body.has_method("take_damage"):
		_has_hit = true
		_emit_hit_event(body)
		body.take_damage(damage)
	queue_free()


func _on_area_entered(area: Area2D) -> void:
	if _has_hit:
		return
	if area.owner == caster:
		return
	if area.is_in_group("projectile"):
		return
	if not is_instance_valid(caster) or not is_instance_valid(area):
		return
	if area.has_method("take_damage"):
		_has_hit = true
		_emit_hit_event(area)
		area.take_damage(damage)
	queue_free()


## 鍙戝皠 ON_HIT 鈫?CombatExecutor锛堝敮涓€鏉冨▉鍏ュ彛锛塡nfunc _emit_hit_event(target: Node2D) -> void:
	var skill := get_meta("skill_data", null) as SkillData

" + _SEP)
+	print("鈿旓笍  CombatTrace  #%d | %s" % [traces.size(), trace.chain_id])
+	print("   鎶€鑳? %s | 浜嬩欢鏁? %d | 鏈€缁堜激瀹? %d" % [trace.skill_name, trace.events.size(), trace.final_damage])
+	print("   浼ゅ閾? %s" % trace.get_damage_chain())

+	var i := 1

+		match ev.category:
+			CombatTraceEvent.Category.FIREWALL_BLOCK:
+				print("%s 馃毇 BLOCKED | %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
+			CombatTraceEvent.Category.MODIFIER_APPLY:
+				var delta: int = ev.metadata.get("delta", 0)
+				var sign := "+" if delta >= 0 else ""
+				print("%s 馃搳 %s: %d 鈫?%d (%s%d)" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.input_data.get("damage", 0), ev.output_data.get("damage", 0), sign, delta])
+			CombatTraceEvent.Category.CONDITION_CHECK:
+				var r: bool = ev.output_data.get("result", false)
+				print("%s 馃攳 %s: %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, "PASS 鉁? if r else "FAIL 鉂?])
+			CombatTraceEvent.Category.EVENT_EMIT:
+				var data_str := ""
+				for k in ev.output_data:
+					if not data_str.is_empty(): data_str += ", "
+					data_str += "%s=%s" % [k, ev.output_data[k]]
+				if not data_str.is_empty(): data_str = "  [%s]" % data_str
+				print("%s 馃摗 %s 鈫?%s%s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.target, data_str])
+			CombatTraceEvent.Category.DAMAGE_RESOLVE:
+				print("%s 馃挜 %s | base=%d" % [prefix, ev.event_name, ev.input_data.get("base_damage", 0)])
+			CombatTraceEvent.Category.SKILL_EXECUTE:
+				var ok: bool = ev.output_data.get("success", false)
+				print("%s 鈿?%s | success=%s" % [prefix, ev.event_name, "OK 鉁? if ok else "FAIL 鉂?])
+			CombatTraceEvent.Category.PHASE_ENTER:
+				print("%s 鈻? %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
+			_:
+				print("%s  路 %s" % [prefix, ev.event_name])
+		i += 1
+
+	print(_SEP + "

feat(combat): extend trace lifecycle to capture ON_HIT, add console output

Defer trace storage for PROJECTILE/AOE skills so ON_HIT events from
projectiles and AoE effects are appended to the same trace chain. Adds
MISS/EXPIRE events on timeout. CombatDebugger now prints formatted trace
summaries to the Godot console on store. Fixes FlameStorm not passing
skill/tags to report_hit, and _emit_event discarding extra_data.
```
